examples.chinese: 一个身穿制服、体格健美的年轻人走到我们桌前来问时间。

examples.english: Witnesses have described the attacker as white, six feet tall and well-built.
examples.chinese: 目击者说攻击者是个白人，身高六英尺，长得很结实。

examples.english: She remembered Martin as a strapping youth with a big appetite.
examples.chinese: 她记得马丁是一个身材魁梧、胃口很大的青年人。

examples.english: The farmer's daughters were a fine pair of strapping young girls.
examples.chinese: 这位农民的一对女儿都是身材高大、体健貌美的年轻姑娘。

examples.english: The gardener's assistant arrived -- a brawny youth who never said a word.
examples.chinese: 园艺师的助手来了—他是一个肌肉发达但从不发一言的青年人。

examples.english: He had a football player's physique: big head, thick neck, brawny shoulders, and heavy legs.
examples.chinese: 他有着足球运动员的体魄：大头、粗脖子、宽肩、粗腿。

centers.english: strong and healthy, and able to deal with illnesses, difficult conditions etc
centers.chinese: 强壮健康，能经受疾病、艰苦的条件等

examples.english: She had three young daughters, all strong and healthy.
examples.chinese: 她有三个年幼的女儿，个个壮实健康。

examples.english: After a week in bed I felt strong enough to try walking a few steps.
examples.chinese: 卧床一个星期之后，我感到有力气能试着走几步路了。

examples.english: Despite his strong constitution, his health was beginning to suffer.
examples.chinese: 他尽管身体很强壮，健康还是开始出现了问题。

examples.english: Maria was small and sturdy, with dark hair and dark eyes.
examples.chinese: 玛丽亚个子矮小敦实，黑头发，黑眼睛。

examples.english: Mrs Harding herself was thin and frail but her son was a sturdy sixteen-year- old.
examples.chinese: 哈丁夫人自己长得瘦弱，可她的儿子却很敦实，有16岁了。

examples.english: The ponies used underground were sturdy little animals that came originally from Northern Spain.
examples.chinese: 地下使用的矮种马是一种矮小结实的马，原产于西班牙北部。

examples.english: Though he was over seventy, he was still robust and active.
examples.chinese: 虽然他已年过70，但身体还是很健壮灵活。

examples.english: Less robust persons might need a siesta, but Eva worked right through from dawn till dusk.
examples.chinese: 身体不是那么健壮的人也许要午睡，但伊娃却从早到晚地工作。

examples.english: The people who lived in the hills were a hardy and hard-working race.
examples.chinese: 住在这山区里的是一个吃苦耐劳的民族。

examples.english: Charolais cattle do not like rain or too much cold. They are not hardy animals.
examples.chinese: 夏洛来牛不喜欢下雨或太冷的天气。它们不是那种能吃苦的动物。

examples.english: When Aunt Agnes caught cholera out in India, we all expected her to die -- but she's a tough old lady and she pulled through.
examples.chinese: 阿格尼丝姑妈在印度得了霍乱时，我们都以为她活不了了—但她是个坚强的老太太，最后挺过来了。

examples.english: I know she's only a kid, but she's tough.
examples.chinese: 我知道她只是个孩子，可她很坚强。

examples.english: Amy will soon be out of hospital -- children of her age are very resilient.
examples.chinese: 埃米很快就能出院—她这个年龄的孩子恢复很快。

examples.english: Being twenty-three years old and quite resilient, I got over the shock pretty quickly.
examples.chinese: 以我23岁的年纪，适应力又强，我很快就从这次打击中恢复过来了。

examples.english: Men are better at some sports because of their greater physical strength.
examples.chinese: 男人在某些体育运动中表现得比女人好，因为男人力气更大。

examples.english: Regular gym sessions will improve both your health and strength.
examples.chinese: 经常健身可以增进健康，增强体力。

examples.english: I didn't have the strength to climb any further.
examples.chinese: 我没有力气再往上爬了。

examples.english: Diana pulled on the rope with all her strength.
examples.chinese: 黛安娜用尽全力拉那条绳子。

examples.english: Bill was doing a lot of exercise to build up his strength.
examples.chinese: 比尔做很多运动以增强体力。

examples.english: Mike had tremendous power in his forearms.
examples.chinese: 迈克前臂力气很大。

examples.english: A dynamometer is used to measure muscle power.
examples.chinese: 测力计用于测量肌肉的力量。

examples.english: You can't be good at tennis if you rely on brawn alone -- it takes skill as well.
examples.chinese: 打网球单靠体力不行—还需要技巧。

examples.english: The battle was won by brain rather than brawn.
examples.chinese: 这场战役是以智取胜，靠的不是蛮劲。

examples.english: I had to use force to get the window open.
examples.chinese: 我得用力把窗打开。

examples.english: The use of physical force by teachers tended to promote violent behaviour by pupils.
examples.chinese: 老师使用武力往往会激起学生的暴力行为。

examples.english: You need stamina to be a long-distance runner.
examples.chinese: 当长跑运动员需要耐力。

examples.english: exercises to increase your strength and stamina
examples.chinese: 增强体力和耐力的运动

examples.english: You have to admire her staying power. No one else has managed to stick that job for more than a year!
examples.chinese: 你不能不佩服她的耐力。那工作没有谁坚持得了一年以上的！

examples.english: Ahmedi's performances were world-class in the 1500 metres but he just didn't have the staying power for longer races.
examples.chinese: 艾哈迈迪在1,500米中的表现是世界一流的，但更长距离的比赛，他的耐力就不够了。

examples.english: The people showed great courage, patience, and endurance during the long years of the war.
examples.chinese: 在漫长的战争岁月里，人们表现出了巨大的勇气、耐心和忍耐力。

examples.english: The triathlon is the ultimate endurance test.
examples.chinese: 铁人三项赛是对一个人忍耐力的终极考验。

examples.english: The expeditions behind enemy lines were a tremendous test of one's endurance and nerves.
examples.chinese: 在敌军后方远征是对一个人的耐力和勇气的极大考验。

examples.english: The bags are made of strong black plastic
examples.chinese: 这些袋子是用结实的黑色塑料做的。

examples.english: You'll need a strong piece of rope for towing the car.
examples.chinese: 你需要一根结实的绳子才拖得动那辆汽车。

examples.english: After full heat treatment, the alloy proved to be five times as strong as the pure aluminium.
examples.chinese: 经过全面的热处理，这种合金证实强度是纯铝的五倍。

examples.english: If internal timbers are removed, the strength of the roof will be seriously impaired.
examples.chinese: 如果把里面的木材拿掉，屋顶的坚固程度就会大大降低。

examples.english: The table seemed solid enough, so I climbed up onto it.
examples.chinese: 桌子看上去够结实的，所以我就爬了上去。

examples.english: rows of solid little houses built of local stone
examples.chinese: 用当地的石头建成的一排排坚固的小房子

examples.english: He rapped his knuckles against the body of the sink unit. It was as solid as a rock.
examples.chinese: 他用指关节敲敲洗涤槽—它非常牢固。

examples.english: The sailors wore jackets made from tough waterproof cotton.
examples.chinese: 水手们穿着用牢固的防水棉布做的衣服。

examples.english: a pair of tough leather boots
examples.chinese: 一双结实的皮靴子

examples.english: Normal floor paint might not be tough enough for the garage.
examples.chinese: 普通的地板漆用在车库里可能不够耐磨。

examples.english: Bronze is harder and more durable than tin.
examples.chinese: 青铜比锡坚硬耐用。

examples.english: What you need for Africa is a simple, durable and inexpensive vehicle.
examples.chinese: 你去非洲需要一辆简单、耐用又便宜的汽车。

examples.english: The roofs are constructed from heavy and durable timbers, usually teak or mahogany.
examples.chinese: 屋顶采用经久耐用的实木，一般是柚木或红木建造。

examples.english: We tested several products for quality and durability.
examples.chinese: 我们测试了几款产品的质量和耐用性。

examples.english: If you are going to put an electric cable underground, you must use the special heavy-duty type.
examples.chinese: 如果要在地下埋电缆，必须使用特别结实耐磨的那种。

examples.english: The emergency equipment includes food, a first-aid kit, and a heavy-duty flashlight.
examples.chinese: 急救装备包括食品、急救箱和一把结实耐用的手电筒。

examples.english: Polyester is not particularly hardwearing but it is cheap.
examples.chinese: 聚酯纤维不是特别耐磨，但是便宜。

examples.english: It's best to lay a good quality, hardwearing carpet.
examples.chinese: 最好铺一种质量好的、耐磨的地毯。

examples.english: A reinforced concrete dome, two metres thick, protects the radioactive core of the nuclear reactor.
examples.chinese: 一个两米厚的钢筋混凝土圆顶保护着核反应堆的放射性活性区。

examples.english: Like all the clothes in the range it has specially reinforced seams.
examples.chinese: 跟这一系列的所有衣服一样，这一件也有特别加固缝。

examples.english: Make sure your patio doors are made of unbreakable glass.
examples.chinese: 阳台的门一定要使用不易打碎的玻璃。

examples.english: a virtually unbreakable vacuum flask
examples.chinese: 一个几乎打不碎的真空热水瓶

examples.english: Until the accident, the ship was considered indestructible.
examples.chinese: 这艘船在出事之前一直被认为是坚不可摧的。

examples.english: There is little point putting an indestructible door in a frame that will rot in 10 years.
examples.chinese: 门框十年就会烂掉，装一扇牢不可破的门就没有多大意义了。

examples.english: I've put in some extra posts to make the fence stronger.
examples.chinese: 我多打了几个桩使篱笆更加牢固。

examples.english: A final heat treatment makes the glass much stronger and improves its optical qualities.
examples.chinese: 最后一个热处理工序使玻璃更为坚固，并提高了它的透光性。

examples.english: The ship's decks will have to be strengthened to carry the extra weight.
examples.chinese: 船上的甲板必须加固，使它可以承受更多的重量。

examples.english: a set of exercises to strengthen the leg muscles
examples.chinese: 增强腿部肌肉力量的一套练习

examples.english: The walls were strengthened with steel rods.
examples.chinese: 这些墙用钢筋加固了。

examples.english: Huge beams have been added at the top of the walls to reinforce the carved medieval roof.
examples.chinese: 墙的上部加了大梁以加固这个中世纪的雕花穹顶。

examples.english: The sea wall at Southend is being reinforced with tons of cement.
examples.chinese: 绍森德的海堤正在用大量的水泥加固。

centers.chinese: 强烈的感情/坚定的信仰

examples.english: The subject of abortion always arouses strong emotions.
examples.chinese: 堕胎问题总是会引起强烈的情绪。

examples.english: Stapleton has very strong views on capital punishment.
examples.chinese: 斯特普尔顿在死刑问题上观点非常激烈。

examples.english: She had a strong urge to sell everything she owned and travel abroad.
examples.chinese: 她有一股强烈的冲动，想把一切卖掉到国外去旅行。

examples.english: The new police have received strong support from local residents.
examples.chinese: 新的政策受到了当地居民的热烈拥护。

examples.english: I don't let people smoke in my house -- it's something I feel very strongly about.
examples.chinese: 我不让人在我屋里抽烟—这一点我是非常坚决的。

examples.english: The President could not ignore the strength of public opinion.
examples.chinese: 总统没法忽视公众舆论的力量。

examples.english: It would give me intense pleasure to beat him at tennis.
examples.chinese: 在网球上把他打败会让我产生强烈的快感。

examples.english: As we waited for the winner to be announced, the excitement was intense.
examples.chinese: 我们等待宣布得奖者时，情绪万分激动。

examples.english: Every car was stopped and searched, which caused intense annoyance to the drivers.
examples.chinese: 每一辆车都被拦下来搜查，引起了司机的强烈不满。

examples.english: From the moment I first met him I disliked him intensely.
examples.chinese: 我从第一眼看到他就非常不喜欢他。

examples.english: I remember many passionate arguments taking place around this table.
examples.chinese: 我记得，这张桌子旁发生过许多激烈的争论。

examples.english: He's passionate about the need to protect the environment.
examples.chinese: 他坚决主张要保护环境。

examples.english: Thatcher has always been a passionate believer in the ideals of a free market economy.
examples.chinese: 撒切尔一向是自由市场经济这一理想的热情信奉者。

examples.english: He was passionately against nuclear weapons.
examples.chinese: 他强烈反对核武器。

examples.english: He delivered his speech with passion and conviction.
examples.chinese: 他的演说充满了激情和力量。

examples.english: Jealousy is a very powerful emotion.
examples.chinese: 嫉妒是一种很强烈的情绪。

examples.english: Her desire to hit him was so powerful that she had to force herself to leave the room at once.
examples.chinese: 她想揍他的欲望非常强烈，所以她不得不逼着自己马上离开房间。

examples.english: I have always had a deep affection for your family.
examples.chinese: 我一向对你们一家人怀有深厚的感情。

examples.english: The news came as a deep disappointment to us all.
examples.chinese: 这个消息传来，令我们大家都深感失望。

examples.english: Please accept our deepest sympathies. used when someone has died
examples.chinese: 请接受我们深切的慰问。〔用于某人去世时〕

examples.english: He was deeply offended by their remarks.
examples.chinese: 他们的话使他大为恼火。

examples.english: Despite her troubled life she has always had a fervent belief in God.
examples.chinese: 她尽管生活坎坷，还是一直虔诚地信奉上帝。

examples.english: Most of the people here are fervent supporters of self-determination.
examples.chinese: 这里大多数人强烈地支持自决。

examples.english: He will be remembered as a politician who fervently argued for what he believed in.
examples.chinese: 他将因身为一位能够为自己的信仰积极抗争的政治家而名垂后世。

examples.english: He was a man of strong beliefs and had always given ardent support to the Reform cause.
examples.chinese: 他是一个具有坚定信念的人，一向积极地支持改革事业。

examples.english: Even his most ardent supporters disagreed with this move.
examples.chinese: 甚至连他最热情的支持者也不赞同这个行动。

examples.english: She ardently believed that women should have the same rights as men and was determined to fight for this.
examples.chinese: 她坚信妇女应该享有与男人同样的权利，并决心为之奋斗。

examples.english: When you have flu, you feel tired and weak for a long time.
examples.chinese: 感冒的时候，很长一段时间都觉得疲倦和虚弱。

examples.english: The child was too weak to undergo a transplant operation.
examples.chinese: 这孩子身体太虚弱，无法进行移植手术。

examples.english: I can't go running - I've got a weak heart.
examples.chinese: 我不可以去跑步—我的心脏不太好。

examples.english: The soldiers were weak from hunger and exhaustion.
examples.chinese: 士兵因为饥饿和疲劳变得虚弱。

examples.english: She felt weak with emotion at the sight of him.
examples.chinese: 看到他，她激动得瘫软下来。

examples.english: In spite of his physical weakness Harry kept himself as busy and active as possible.
examples.chinese: 尽管身体虚弱，哈里仍尽量让自己活得充实积极。

examples.english: a frail 85-year-old lady
examples.chinese: 一位瘦弱的85岁老太太

examples.english: She sat up a little straighter, raising her frail body in the bed.
examples.chinese: 她在床上撑起虚弱的身体，稍稍坐直些。

examples.english: We hadn't seen her for many years and were shocked by her frailty.
examples.chinese: 我们有许多年没见到她了，她那么瘦弱，让我们感到惊愕。

examples.english: My grandmother's very feeble now and needs someone at home full-time to look after her.
examples.chinese: 我祖母现在身体非常衰弱，需要有人全天在家照顾她。

examples.english: He did not remember his sister at all, except as a tiny, feeble baby.
examples.chinese: 在他的印象中妹妹只是个弱小的婴儿，除此之外他什么也记不起了。

examples.english: I watched him as he tried, very slowly and feebly, to get out of bed.
examples.chinese: 我看着他试图从床上起来，行动非常缓慢，身体虚弱无力。

examples.english: The baby felt so fragile in his arms.
examples.chinese: 他怀中的婴儿给他的感觉是那么纤弱。

examples.english: Two ambulance attendants picked up his fragile body and put him carefully onto a stretcher.
examples.chinese: 两名救护员抬起他虚弱的身体，小心翼翼地把他放在担架上。

examples.english: Even after the long months of therapy Owen was still very shaky.
examples.chinese: 即使经过好几个月的治疗，欧文走路仍是摇摇晃晃的。

examples.english: Her grandfather was a little shaky on his feet after the fall.
examples.chinese: 她祖父摔了一跤后，走起路来有点不稳。

examples.english: The baby's taken her first few shaky steps.
examples.chinese: 这个婴孩已经摇摇晃晃的会走几步路了。

examples.english: As I entered the room, he reached for his stick and got shakily to his feet.
examples.chinese: 我走进房间时，他伸手去拿拐杖，然后摇摇晃晃地站起来。

examples.english: Pete was a puny little boy with short hair and glasses.
examples.chinese: 皮特是个瘦小虚弱的小男孩，短头发、戴眼镜。

examples.english: His wife was such a big strong woman, she made him look puny.
examples.chinese: 他的妻子那么高大壮实，令他看起来瘦小虚弱。

examples.english: Mouse got his nickname because he was small and weedy.
examples.chinese: 因为他瘦弱矮小，所以得了“老鼠”这个外号。

examples.english: Most of the kids were weaklings and were frightened of getting in a fight.
examples.chinese: 大部分孩子都很懦弱，害怕与人打架。

examples.english: Everyone called me a weed when I was at school because I was so bad at sports.
examples.chinese: 我在学校时大家说我弱不禁风，因为我体育很差。

examples.english: He came across as a weak and indecisive leader.
examples.chinese: 他给人的印象是一个软弱无力、优柔寡断的领导者。

examples.english: Weak management led to failure of the business.
examples.chinese: 管理不力导致公司倒闭。

examples.english: In 1949-50 China was a weak, vulnerable country, devastated by war.
examples.chinese: 该国是个脆弱无力的国家，饱受战争的摧残。

examples.english: The President has often been accused of weakness.
examples.chinese: 总统常常被指责为软弱无能。

examples.english: a small vulnerable child in need of protection
examples.chinese: 需要保护的易受伤害的小孩

examples.english: Wild animals are at their most vulnerable when they are asleep.
examples.chinese: 野生动物睡觉的时候最易受到攻击。

examples.english: The virus leaves sufferers vulnerable to a range of infections.
examples.chinese: 这种病毒使病人容易遭受各种感染。

examples.english: No one is doing anything to help these poor defenceless children.
examples.chinese: 对于这些可怜的没有自卫能力的孩子，没有人给予任何帮助。

examples.english: While the mother bird searches for food she has to leave her chicks alone and defenseless in the nest.
examples.chinese: 鸟妈妈出去找食物时，不得不让小鸟单独无助地留在巢里。

examples.english: He closed the door behind him, leaving her cruelly defenceless against his bitter attack.
examples.chinese: 他关上门，任由她对他的毒打毫无反抗能力，十分残酷。

centers.english: to make someone or something weak

examples.english: Her long illness has weakened her so much that she has difficulty walking.
examples.chinese: 她因长期患病导致身体非常虚弱，连走路都有困难。

examples.english: The city's defences had been weakened by enemy shelling.
examples.chinese: 敌人的炮轰削弱了这座城市的防御力量。

examples.english: They were travelling very slowly, and the heavy load they were carrying sapped their strength.
examples.chinese: 他们一路走得非常慢，而且携带的东西太重，消耗了他们的气力。

examples.english: The constant tension was sapping my energy.
examples.chinese: 持续的紧张气氛正消耗着我的精力。

examples.english: He was still suffering the debilitating effects of flu.
examples.chinese: 流感还在削弱他的体力。

examples.english: The conditions under which doctors work are increasingly unhealthy and debilitating.
examples.chinese: 医生的工作环境越来越不利于健康，使人衰弱。

examples.english: By 1945, the country's power was weakening considerably.
examples.chinese: 到了1945年，该国国力大大减弱。

examples.english: The soldiers’ morale was beginning to weaken.
examples.chinese: 士兵的士气开始低落。

examples.english: Briggs’ resolve crumbled and he reached for the whisky bottle.
examples.chinese: 布里格斯的决心动摇了，伸手去拿威士忌酒瓶。

examples.english: Marigolds are a strong breed, less likely to wilt than other plants.
examples.chinese: 金盏花生命力强，不像其他植物那样容易枯萎。

examples.english: The plant in the corner was wilting, its brilliant yellow petals scattered on the floor.
examples.chinese: 角落里那株花正在枯萎，金黄色的花瓣散落在地上。

examples.english: These flowers are beginning to droop. You'd better water them.
examples.chinese: 这些花开始蔫了，你最好给它们浇水。

examples.english: He watered the vines so little that the leaves drooped and the tendrils withered.
examples.chinese: 他很少给葡萄藤浇水，叶子都蔫了，卷须也枯萎了。

centers.english: very active and full of energy
centers.chinese: 非常活跃且充满活力的

examples.english: If you're feeling energetic, we could go out for a run.
examples.chinese: 如果你觉得有精力，我们可以出去跑跑步。

examples.english: My mother was a bustling, energetic woman.
examples.chinese: 我的母亲是个忙忙碌碌、充满活力的妇女。

examples.english: The club has the support of an energetic and enthusiastic management committee.
examples.chinese: 俱乐部有一个积极热心的管理委员会作支柱。

expressions.text: be full of energy/bursting with energy

examples.english: William raced up the stairs, full of energy and excitement.
examples.chinese: 威廉快步跑上楼梯，浑身散发着活力和激情。

examples.english: You have to be bursting with energy and health to do the top jobs, so they usually go to younger men.
examples.chinese: 职位高的工作需要充沛的精力和健康的身体，所以一般是由年纪较轻的男性得到。

examples.english: She may be over 80, but she's still very active!
examples.chinese: 她可能已经八十多岁了，但是仍然非常活跃！

examples.english: Aaron seemed like a normal active baby until he was about ten months old.
examples.chinese: 阿伦在十个月大之前是一个活泼好动的婴儿，似乎一切正常。

examples.english: She is clearly a dynamic young woman with big ambitions.
examples.chinese: 她显然是个干劲十足的年轻女子，有很大的抱负。

examples.english: What this country needs is dynamic and inspiring leadership!
examples.chinese: 这个国家需要的是有冲劲、能激励斗志的领导班子！

examples.english: Martin was a very popular teacher and a tireless worker for the school.
examples.chinese: 马丁是学校里一位深受欢迎的老师，也是孜孜不倦的工作者。

examples.english: She has been a tireless peace campaigner for many years.
examples.chinese: 多年来她一直是一位不屈不挠的和平运动倡导者。

examples.english: Our youngest daughter was hyperactive, and it had a damaging effect on the whole family.
examples.chinese: 我们的幼女是一个多动的孩子，把全家人都搞得无法安宁。

examples.english: The City is full of hyperactive executives who never stop rushing around.
examples.chinese: 这个城市里到处都是精力过人的行政人员，他们一刻也闲不下来。

examples.english: Dan's a nice boy, but rather boisterous.
examples.chinese: 丹是个好孩子，只是吵了点。

examples.english: A large, boisterous crowd poured into the bar, singing and shouting noisily.
examples.chinese: 一大群闹哄哄的人拥进酒吧，大声地唱着叫着。

examples.english: The kids were out in the backyard playing and fighting boisterously.
examples.chinese: 孩子们在后院里闹嚷嚷地嬉戏打闹。

examples.english: She was a lively and adventurous girl - not one for a quiet life.
examples.chinese: 她是个充满活力、喜欢冒险的女孩—是不会甘于过平静的生活的。

examples.english: As a speaker, he was articulate, lively, and funny.
examples.chinese: 作为一名演讲者，他口才极好、生动而又风趣。

examples.english: Laura was an all-American type -- cute, blonde, vivacious.
examples.chinese: 劳拉是那种典型的美国女人—可爱、金发、活泼。

examples.english: He married a vivacious girl called Sarah who he met at university.
examples.chinese: 他娶了个活泼可爱的姑娘，名叫萨拉，是他在大学里认识的。

examples.english: ‘It's so wonderful to see you all!’ she said vivaciously.
examples.chinese: “见到你们真是太好了。”她欢欣雀跃地说道。

examples.english: Mike tends to be more animated in the presence of women.
examples.chinese: 迈克在女性面前往往很活跃。

examples.english: As the evening went on she became quite animated, talking and laughing with the other girls.
examples.chinese: 那天晚上她渐渐地兴致越来越高，和其他女孩子又说又笑。

examples.english: Stephen was a normal boy of seven, full of life and fun.
examples.chinese: 斯蒂芬是一个正常的七岁男孩，充满活力，喜欢玩闹。

examples.english: Before the accident he had been a cheerful, confident man, full of life.
examples.chinese: 出事之前，他是一个乐观自信的男人，充满了活力。

examples.english: I wish I was one of those people who are full of beans first thing in the morning.
examples.chinese: 但愿我是一个早上一起床就精力充沛的人。

examples.english: You'd never think she'd been ill -- she came bouncing in this morning, full of beans.
examples.chinese: 你绝对料不到她是生过病的人—今天早晨她蹦蹦跳跳着进来，浑身充满了活力。

examples.english: After the divorce she felt really alive for the first time in her life.
examples.chinese: 离婚之后，她此生头一回感到自己充满活力。

examples.english: I only feel truly alive when I'm outside, in the open air.
examples.chinese: 我唯有在户外，在露天才真正地活了起来。

centers.chinese: 充满活力的活动、行为等

examples.english: Pete was lying on his bed, resting after an energetic game of tennis.
examples.chinese: 皮特打了一场非常耗力的网球，正躺在床上休息。

examples.english: I don't feel like doing anything very energetic this evening. I've had a tiring day.
examples.chinese: 今天晚上我不想干费力的事。我已经累了一天了。

examples.english: A group of cyclists passed us, pedalling energetically up the hill.
examples.chinese: 一群自行车手从我们身边经过，有力地蹬着踏板往山上骑去。

examples.english: Next there was a vigorous Russian dance, with plenty of stamping of feet and clapping.
examples.chinese: 接下去是一个充满活力的俄罗斯舞蹈，有很多跺脚和拍手的动作。

examples.english: According to a recent survey, a quarter of people over twelve get no vigorous exercise at all.
examples.chinese: 根据最近的一个调查，12岁以上者有四分之一的人根本就没有做过剧烈的运动。

examples.english: He seized me by the shoulders and shook me vigorously.
examples.chinese: 他抓住我的肩膀，用力地摇我。

examples.english: The prisoners were finally released, thanks to the tireless efforts of their families and friends.
examples.chinese: 由于家人和朋友的不懈努力，这些囚犯终于获释。

examples.english: Rescuers worked tirelessly to free the survivors from the rubble.
examples.chinese: 救援人员不知疲倦地努力从碎石瓦砾中解救幸存者。

examples.english: A group of children entertained us with a lively dance called a tarantella.
examples.chinese: 一群孩子给我们表演了一种非常活泼的舞蹈，名叫塔兰台拉舞。

examples.english: Any question about taxation is likely to produce a lively debate in parliament.
examples.chinese: 有关税收的任何问题都有可能在议会中引起一场激烈的辩论。

examples.english: The two Americans were having an animated discussion about basketball.
examples.chinese: 那两个美国人正在热烈地讨论篮球。

examples.english: Peter was engaged in an animated conversation at the bar.
examples.chinese: 彼得在酒吧里和别人正谈得起劲。

examples.english: Certain vitamins can give you more energy, if you're always feeling tired.
examples.chinese: 如果你总是感到疲劳，某些维生素可以给你补充能量。

examples.english: She's got tremendous energy and a huge capacity for hard work.
examples.chinese: 她精力无穷，很能吃苦。

examples.english: I don't have the time or the energy to go out in the evenings.
examples.chinese: 晚上我没有时间，也没有精力外出。

examples.english: His new job was certainly a challenge, but Edward tackled it with vigour and imagination.
examples.chinese: 他的新工作无疑是一个挑战，但是爱德华精力充沛，想象力丰富，就这么对付了过去。

examples.english: Holidays make it possible for you to return to your normal routine with renewed vigour and enthusiasm.
examples.chinese: 度假可以让你有新的活力和热情回到正常的日常工作中去。

examples.english: Fred got the job because he seemed to have more get-up-and-go than the other applicants.
examples.chinese: 弗雷德得到这份工作是因为他似乎比其他应征的人更有冲劲。

examples.english: Golden Crunchies will help you start the day with that get-up-and-go feeling.
examples.chinese: “金脆”让你新的一天干劲十足。

examples.english: He was a small man with enormous vitality.
examples.chinese: 他是个精力非常旺盛的小个子男人。

examples.english: Gail was someone who needed the stimulus of a big city to maintain her mental vitality.
examples.chinese: 盖尔就是这种人，她需要大城市的刺激来保持她的思想活力。

examples.english: Marian didn't do well at school. She was intelligent, but very lazy.
examples.chinese: 玛丽安学习不好。她很聪明，但是很懒。

examples.english: Get up, you lazy thing! It's nearly lunchtime.
examples.chinese: 起床吧，你这个懒东西！快要吃午饭了。

examples.english: We spent a lazy afternoon at the beach.
examples.chinese: 我们在沙滩上懒洋洋地过了一个下午。

examples.english: The lazy days of summer are finally here.
examples.chinese: 懒洋洋的夏天终于到了。

examples.english: His bad exam results were due to laziness and nothing else.
examples.chinese: 他考得不好就是因为懒惰，没有其他原因。

examples.english: Mark thinks that the welfare system encourages laziness.
examples.chinese: 马克认为福利制度助长人的惰性。

examples.english: It was great to spend my day off lying lazily by the swimming pool.
examples.chinese: 懒洋洋地在游泳池边躺上一天真是妙不可言。

examples.english: Wake up that idle young brother of yours and tell him it's time for school!
examples.chinese: 叫醒你的懒弟弟，告诉他该上学了！

examples.english: Painting is a favorite hobby of the idle rich.
examples.chinese: 画画是有钱的闲人最喜欢的爱好。

examples.english: That husband of hers is bone idle. No wonder the house is such a mess.
examples.chinese: 她那个丈夫懒到家了，怪不得家里乱七八糟的。

examples.english: Her third son chose to live at home in idleness rather than follow a profession.
examples.chinese: 她的第三个儿子宁可在家闲着，也不去从事个什么职业。

examples.english: When I asked her to help me she said that she couldn't be bothered.
examples.chinese: 我叫她帮我一下，她说她可不想费这个神。

expressions.text: can't be bothered to do something

examples.english: My hairdresser says I should use a hairdryer to dry my hair, but I can't be bothered to do it every day.
examples.chinese: 我的发型师说我应该用电吹风吹干头发，可我不愿意每天都这么麻烦。

examples.english: They complain so much about the government, but they can't be bothered to vote.
examples.chinese: 他们对政府怨言很多，却又不愿意投票选举。

examples.english: Hey, lazybones, how long are you planning on staying in bed?
examples.chinese: 嗨，懒骨头，你打算在床上待多久？

examples.english: ‘I was a complete couch potato,’ Lewis said, ‘I didn't even like walking to the store.’
examples.chinese: “我是个十足的沙发马铃薯。”刘易斯说，“我甚至走去商店都不愿意。”

examples.english: Mitchell is a self-described ‘couch potato’.
examples.chinese: 米切尔自称是“沙发马铃薯”

examples.english: How did you get mixed up with that layabout?
examples.chinese: 你怎么跟那个懒鬼混在一起呢？

examples.english: a bunch of hopeless layabouts
examples.chinese: 一群无可救药的游手好闲之徒

examples.english: I always thought Clive was a bit of a skiver.
examples.chinese: 我总觉得克莱夫是个很懒惰的人。

centers.english: to behave in a lazy way

examples.english: We lazed around on the beach most of the day.
examples.chinese: 这天我们大部分时间就懒洋洋地在沙滩上度过。

examples.english: Why not finish your homework, instead of just sitting around doing nothing?
examples.chinese: 不要光坐着无所事事，为什么不去把功课做完呢？

examples.english: It's a perfect place to lounge around -- hot sunshine and free drinks.
examples.chinese: 这是个休闲的好地方—炽热的阳光、免费的饮料。

examples.english: We don't want anyone shirking round here -- everyone is expected to earn their pay.
examples.chinese: 我们不希望这里有人偷懒，每个人都应该拿一份工资出一份力。

examples.english: Our father never shirked his responsibilities.
examples.chinese: 我们的父亲从来不逃避责任。

examples.english: John doesn't want to go to war, but he won't shirk his duty.
examples.chinese: 约翰不想上战场，但是他不会逃避责任。

examples.english: It's amazing he hasn't been fired -- everyone knows what a shirker he is.
examples.chinese: 他没被解雇真是个奇迹，大家都知道他很偷懒。

examples.english: Tim doesn't lift a finger when it comes to housework.
examples.chinese: 蒂姆从不帮忙做家务事。

expressions.text: not lift a finger to help

examples.english: We spent the day moving furniture, but Sara didn't lift a finger to help.
examples.chinese: 我们一天都在搬家具，而萨拉连手指都没抬一下。

centers.chinese: 锻炼或工作后感到劳累的

examples.english: I usually feel too tired to cook dinner after a day at the office.
examples.chinese: 在办公室工作一天后，我常常累得不能做饭。

examples.english: We sat down and stretched out our tired legs.
examples.chinese: 我们坐下来伸展疲惫的双腿。

examples.english: They came back from their long walk, tired but relaxed.
examples.chinese: 他们走了很长路程后回来，感到很累但很放松。

examples.english: Overly tired drivers can be nearly as dangerous as drunk drivers.
examples.chinese: 过度劳累的驾车者和酒醉的驾车者差不多一样危险。

examples.english: Can we stop soon? I'm getting really tired.
examples.chinese: 我们能否马上停下来？我真的非常累了。

examples.english: I was exhausted every day when I first started teaching, but I'm used to it now.
examples.chinese: 我刚开始教书时每天都觉得精疲力竭，但现在我已习惯了。

examples.english: The exhausted dancers collapsed as they stepped off the stage.
examples.chinese: 精疲力竭的舞蹈演员走下舞台时瘫倒在地上。

examples.english: The five of them were still exhausted from their 36-hour train ride.
examples.chinese: 他们五个人乘了36小时的火车后，仍然感到疲惫不堪。

examples.english: We had been walking for over 20 miles, and we were completely exhausted.
examples.chinese: 我们走了二十多英里，完全筋疲力尽了。

examples.english: Come in and sit down. You look worn out.
examples.chinese: 进来坐下吧，你看上去疲惫不堪。

examples.english: The men had been working in the fields all day and they were tired out.
examples.chinese: 那些人在田里干了一整天活，都累坏了。

examples.english: Susan and Lloyd were both tired out from feeding, bathing, and putting the children to bed.
examples.chinese: 苏珊和劳埃德给孩子们喂饭、洗澡、弄他们上床，两个人都累极了。

examples.english: When he came out of the exam he felt shattered.
examples.chinese: 他考完试出来后感到精疲力竭。

examples.english: I've had a terrible day at the office and I'm absolutely shattered.
examples.chinese: 今天在办公室里非常忙碌，我累极了。

examples.english: After the hike the two were so weary they fell asleep immediately.
examples.chinese: 远足后两人累得倒头便睡。

examples.english: Snow in Boston closed down the airport, causing even more delays for weary travellers.
examples.chinese: 波士顿下的那场雪使得机场关闭，给疲倦不堪的旅客造成了更多的延误。

examples.english: My head grew weary from trying to follow his arguments.
examples.chinese: 努力让思路跟上他的论点使我非常疲倦。

examples.english: A middle-aged waitress came wearily over to them to take their order.
examples.chinese: 一个中年女服务员疲倦地来到他们面前听他们点菜。

examples.english: By the end of the day I felt drained, with nothing to show for all my work.
examples.chinese: 一天结束时我感到精疲力竭，做了那么多工作却什么也看不出来。

examples.english: After losing the game, Coach Saylor came to the press conference looking and sounding emotionally drained.
examples.chinese: 比赛落败以后，塞勒教练来到新闻发布会上，他的面色和语气都显得疲惫。

examples.english: I've been up since four o'clock this morning - I'm absolutely knackered!
examples.chinese: 今天早上我4点就起床了——我简直累坏了！！

examples.english: When you're training a team sometimes it's good to push them until they're knackered.
examples.chinese: 在训练一支球队时，有时敦促他们练到筋疲力尽是有好处的。

examples.english: Wow, I'm pooped. I don't feel like going to the gym tonight.
examples.chinese: 啊，我累极了，今晚不想去健身房了。

examples.english: You look beat - what have you been doing?
examples.chinese: 你看起来累极了，你干什么了?

examples.english: Will you excuse me? I'm bushed - I think I'll go to bed.
examples.chinese: 很抱歉，我太累了。我想上床去睡了。

expressions.text: be dead on your feet/be ready to drop

examples.english: After fourteen hours of non-stop work I was dead on my feet.
examples.chinese: 在不停地工作了14小时之后，我累得都站不住了。

examples.english: For goodness’ sake go home! You look ready to drop.
examples.chinese: 看在上帝的份上，回家去吧！你看上去累得快倒下了。

examples.english: The kids were really tired, so we sent them to bed.
examples.chinese: 孩子们累极了，所以我们打发他们上床。

examples.english: I tried to watch the news on TV, but I was too tired to stay awake.
examples.chinese: 我想看电视新闻，可是累得无法睁开眼皮。

examples.english: ‘Aren't you sleepy?’ ‘No, I took a nap this afternoon.’
examples.chinese: “你不觉得累吗？”“不觉得，下午我打过盹了。”

examples.english: It's no easy task getting three sleepy children out of the car and into the house.
examples.chinese: 把三个打瞌睡的孩子从汽车里抱出来弄进屋里可不是件轻松的事。

examples.english: We arrived at the hotel late at night, and were too sleepy to notice how beautiful it was.
examples.chinese: 我们很晚才到达旅馆，困得都没注意到它有多漂亮。

examples.english: ‘What time is it?’ she said sleepily.
examples.chinese: “现在几点了？”她困倦地问道。

examples.english: You shouldn't drive after taking these pills - they can make you drowsy.
examples.chinese: 你服了这些药片后不应开车，这些药片会使你昏昏欲睡。

examples.english: Len had drunk too much wine, and he felt cosy and drowsy in spite of the coffee.
examples.chinese: 莱恩喝了太多酒，尽管喝了咖啡，还是感觉温暖舒适、昏昏欲睡。

examples.english: ‘Wyatt, what is it?’ Sue called, half-asleep, from the bedroom.
examples.chinese: “怀亚特，什么事？”休从卧室内半睡半醒地喊道。

examples.english: Moira was half-asleep when the phone rang and it took her a few seconds to realize what it was.
examples.chinese: 莫伊拉非常困，这时电话铃响了，几秒钟后她才意识到那是什么声音。

expressions.text: can hardly/can barely/can't keep your eyes open

examples.english: I can't keep my eyes open - I've got to go to bed.
examples.chinese: 我累得眼睛都睁不开了，我得上床去睡了。

examples.english: The kids were still full of energy, but Julie and I could hardly keep our eyes open.
examples.chinese: 孩子们仍然精力充沛，但朱莉和我却累得几乎睁不开眼了。

examples.english: By the time we finally got home, I could barely keep my eyes open.
examples.chinese: 我们终于到家时，我累得眼睛都快睁不开了。

centers.english: tired and having no interest in anything
centers.chinese: 累得对什么事都没兴趣的

examples.english: All this hot weather is making me feel lethargic.
examples.chinese: 这种炎热天气让我感到懒洋洋的。

examples.english: Patients with depression may be lethargic during the day and unable to sleep at night.
examples.chinese: 抑郁症病人可能会白天无精打采，夜晚睡不着觉。

examples.english: The spectacular play inspired his lethargic teammates to start playing harder.
examples.chinese: 这场吸引了大量观众的比赛激励了他那些无精打采的队友打得卖力起来。

examples.english: Tim is listless on the job and keeps making dumb mistakes.
examples.chinese: 蒂姆工作做得无精打采，不断犯愚蠢的错误。

examples.english: The last few years of my mother's life she was tired and listless most of the time.
examples.chinese: 我母亲在她生命的最后几年里，大部分时候都疲惫不堪，无精打采。

examples.english: She had to keep thinking up new ways to hold the attention of her listless pupils.
examples.chinese: 她得不断想出新花样来吸引那些无精打采的学生的注意力。

examples.english: I've never seen him look so tired.
examples.chinese: 我从未看见过他那么累的样子。

examples.english: Look at their tired little faces.
examples.chinese: 看看他们那疲倦的小脸。

examples.english: She had tired-looking bags under her eyes.
examples.chinese: 她眼睛下面有两个显得疲惫不堪的眼袋。

examples.english: The last time I saw Helena she was looking pretty washed-out. Is she alright?
examples.chinese: 上次我见到海伦娜时，她一副精疲力竭的样子。她没事吧？

examples.english: After twelve hours of driving Jean was bleary-eyed and stiff.
examples.chinese: 连续开了12小时车以后，琼睡眼惺忪，浑身酸痛。

examples.english: The bleary-eyed engineers were still hard at work when everyone else arrived the next day.
examples.chinese: 当其他人第二天到来时，那些睡眼惺忪的工程师仍在奋力工作。

examples.english: Terry's face was pale and drawn when she finally arrived.
examples.chinese: 特丽终于来到时面容苍白憔悴。

examples.english: The emergency meeting had lasted all night, and the President looked drawn as he read the statement.
examples.chinese: 紧急会议开了一个通宵，总统宣读声明时显得很憔悴。

examples.english: If you get tired, just stop for a while.
examples.chinese: 如果你感到累了就歇一会儿。

examples.english: We talked until we both got tired and decided to go to bed.
examples.chinese: 我们一直谈到两个人都感到累了，于是决定上床睡觉。

examples.english: Since her illness, she finds that she gets tired really easily.
examples.chinese: 自从生病之后，她感觉自己很容易疲倦。

examples.english: Jenny taught for four hours straight without flagging.
examples.chinese: 珍妮连续授课四小时，一点都不感到疲乏。

examples.english: By the fifth game, I could see that my opponent was beginning to flag.
examples.chinese: 到第五局时，我能看出我的对手开始累了。

expressions.text: tire yourself out/wear yourself out/exhaust yourself

examples.english: The baby's stopped crying. He must have tired himself out.
examples.chinese: 宝宝不哭了，他肯定是哭累了。

examples.english: You're going to wear yourself out if you keep working so hard.
examples.chinese: 如果你再这么拼命工作会累坏的。

examples.english: My poor mother had exhausted herself trying to get ready for company.
examples.chinese: 我可怜的母亲为准备迎接客人，把自己弄得筋疲力尽。

examples.english: If you don't stop working nights and weekends, you'll burn yourself out.
examples.chinese: 如果你还要继续在晚上和周末工作，你就会累垮的。

examples.english: Most of these high-flying young executives burn out before they're 30.
examples.chinese: 这些雄心勃勃的年轻管理人员大部分在30岁前就把自己累垮了。

examples.english: Most of the school's teachers have been there for years and are burnt out.
examples.chinese: 该校的大部分教师在那里已经干了许多年，都累垮了。

examples.english: The home team seemed to run out of steam well before the game was over.
examples.chinese: 早在比赛结束之前，主队似乎就已筋疲力尽了。

examples.english: Gail started the project with a lot of energy and enthusiasm, but at some point she just ran out of steam.
examples.chinese: 盖尔在项目开始时充满了精力和热情，但到后来她就泄气了。

examples.english: Get plenty of rest and try not to tire yourself unnecessarily.
examples.chinese: 多多休息，没必要把自己累坏了。

examples.english: Their constant quarrelling is wearing us out.
examples.chinese: 他们老是吵架，把我们弄得筋疲力尽。

examples.english: The thin air at high altitudes usually tires out people who are not used to the mountains.
examples.chinese: 高海拔的稀薄空气常常会让不习惯爬山的人感到疲劳。

examples.english: The effort of swimming against the current exhausted him.
examples.chinese: 逆水游泳使他筋疲力尽。

expressions.text: it exhausts somebody to do something

examples.english: It exhausted him to talk for too long, but he loved hearing all the theater gossip.
examples.chinese: 过长时间的谈话让他精疲力竭，但他喜欢听所有戏剧界的小道消息。

examples.english: I won't tire you with a long visit. I just wanted to stop in and see how you were doing.
examples.chinese: 我这次拜访时间不会很长，免得让你感到疲劳，我只是想顺路来看看你怎么样了。

expressions.text: take it out ofsb/do somebody in

examples.english: Dale's a construction worker. You know, that sort of work really takes it out of you.
examples.chinese: 戴尔是个建筑工人。你知道，那种工作实在是很累人的。

examples.english: It wasn't the cooking so much as all the cleaning up that did me in.
examples.chinese: 让我筋疲力尽的倒不是做饭菜，而是那么多的打扫工作。

examples.english: It nearly killed me carrying that fridge up the stairs!
examples.chinese: 把那台冰箱抬上楼去差点把我累死了！

examples.english: The journey was really tiring.
examples.chinese: 这次旅行太累人了。

examples.english: Sam couldn't wait for the whole tiring ordeal to be over.
examples.chinese: 萨姆等不及这场累人的磨难结束。

examples.english: I've had such a tiring day. I just want to take a bath and go to bed.
examples.chinese: 我今天太累了，我去洗个澡就上床睡觉。

examples.english: She's just returned from another exhausting lecture tour.
examples.chinese: 她刚完成另一次令人疲惫不堪的巡回讲课回来。

examples.english: I had to drive nine hours without a break - it was exhausting.
examples.chinese: 我得连续不停地驾车九小时，真是累人。

examples.english: Starting a small business can be the most physically and mentally exhausting task you've ever done.
examples.chinese: 开一家小公司可能是你做过的最令人身心疲乏的事。

examples.english: Taking care of a two-year-old is hard work.
examples.chinese: 照看一个两岁大的孩子是件苦差。

examples.english: It was a long hard walk back to the nearest town.
examples.chinese: 走回最近的小镇路途漫长而艰苦。

examples.english: When I come home from a hard day at work, I don't feel like talking to anyone.
examples.chinese: 我辛苦工作了一天，回到家里后不想和任何人说话。

examples.english: I find her constant questions and chatter rather wearing.
examples.chinese: 她不停的提问和喋喋不休让我厌倦。

examples.english: Kids of that age can be very wearing, can't they?
examples.chinese: 那个年龄的孩子会让人感到很累，是吗？

examples.english: Tiredness and headaches are common signs of stress.
examples.chinese: 疲劳和头痛是精神紧张的常见症状。

examples.english: Camomile tea soothes the nerves and relieves tiredness.
examples.chinese: 甘菊茶能够松弛神经，消除疲劳。

examples.english: A terrible tiredness had overcome her, leaving her no energy for extra activities.
examples.chinese: 她疲惫不堪，再没有气力参加其他的活动。

examples.english: The soldiers were suffering from exhaustion after long days and nights of marching.
examples.chinese: 不分昼夜的行军让士兵们精疲力竭。

examples.english: The signs of chronic exhaustion showed in Martha's face.
examples.chinese: 玛莎的脸上显出长期疲劳的痕迹。

examples.english: One of the players collapsed with exhaustion and had to be carried off the field.
examples.chinese: 有一名球员因疲劳而瘫倒，只得被抬出场外。

examples.english: The drug can cause drowsiness.
examples.chinese: 这种药会使人昏昏欲睡。

examples.english: Robert stopped fighting the drowsiness and sank back in the soft chair.
examples.chinese: 罗伯特不再抗拒困倦感，又坐回柔软的椅子上。

examples.english: Symptoms of the illness include fever, fatigue, and loss of appetite.
examples.chinese: 这种病的症状包括发烧、极度疲劳以及胃口不好。

examples.english: Driving in stressful conditions can lead to muscle fatigue.
examples.chinese: 在充满压力的情况下驾车会导致肌肉疲劳。

examples.english: She seemed depressed and was beginning to show signs of fatigue.
examples.chinese: 她看起来情绪低落，而且开始有极度疲劳的症状。

examples.english: Another common symptom of a hangover is lethargy and muscular weakness.
examples.chinese: 宿醉的另一个常见症状是没精打采和肌肉无力。

examples.english: It is not unusual for new mothers to go to the doctor complaining of tiredness, lethargy, and mild depression.
examples.chinese: 刚做母亲的去医生那里诉说有疲劳、没精打采和轻度抑郁等症状是常见的事。

examples.english: I always get jet-lag when I fly from London to New York.
examples.chinese: 我从伦敦飞往纽约后总感到时差调整不过来。

examples.english: On the first morning of the conference, most of us were still jet-lagged.
examples.chinese: 举行会议的第一个早上，我们大多数人仍感到时差还没有调整过来。

examples.english: Young boys recruited at an early age by soccer clubs often suffer from burnout before they're out of their teens.
examples.chinese: 年龄还小就被足球俱乐部招揽的男孩常常20岁还未到就已经感觉筋疲力尽。

examples.english: Larry was tall and thin with dark brown hair and bright blue eyes.
examples.chinese: 拉里又高又瘦，长着一头深棕色的头发和一双明亮的蓝眼睛。

examples.english: She looked pale, thin, and unhealthy.
examples.chinese: 她看上去苍白消瘦，不大健康。

examples.english: I wish my legs were thinner.
examples.chinese: 但愿我的腿能再瘦一点。

examples.english: Yoshida is a slight, quiet man with a grey beard.
examples.chinese: 吉田是个瘦小而寡言的男人，长着灰白胡须。

examples.english: a small, slight child with delicate-looking features
examples.chinese: 一个眉清目秀、细小柔弱的孩子

examples.english: She was tall, slim, blond, and really good-looking.
examples.chinese: 她身材高而瘦，一头金发，非常漂亮。

examples.english: Mrs Ester was in her late thirties, about average height, with a slim figure.
examples.chinese: 埃斯特尔太太快40岁了，中等身高，身材苗条。

examples.english: You're looking slimmer - have you lost weight?
examples.chinese: 你看上去瘦了，体重减了吗？

examples.english: She looks great -- how does she stay so slim?
examples.chinese: 她看上去真不错一她是怎么让身材保持得这么苗条的？

examples.english: Gabriel was a tall slender young man with a light brown moustache.
examples.chinese: 加布里埃尔是个身材修长的年轻人，留着淡棕色的小胡子。

examples.english: Mandy was slender and very fair with long golden hair.
examples.chinese: 曼迪身材苗条，皮肤白皙，长着一头金色长发。

examples.english: She had long, slender expressive hands, like a concert pianist.
examples.chinese: 她有一双修长、富有表现力的手，就像音乐会上的钢琴家。

examples.english: In contrast to Francesca, who was tall and willowy, Diana was small and curvy.
examples.chinese: 弗朗西丝卡又高又苗条，而黛安娜与她正相反，长得矮小而曲线玲珑。

examples.english: Anastasia was willowy and graceful, with grey eyes and long, straight red hair.
examples.chinese: 阿纳斯塔西娅身材苗条、举止优雅，长着一双灰色的眼睛和一头红色的长直发。

examples.english: He's a very handsome man: tall, lean and tanned with thick blond hair.
examples.chinese: 他很英俊，瘦高个儿，皮肤黝黑，长着一头浓密的金发。

examples.english: At seventy-two my grandfather was lean and strong and I expected him to live forever.
examples.chinese: 我祖父72岁时身体瘦而强壮，我觉得他能永远活下去。

examples.english: She had a runner's lean physique and an overall healthy glow.
examples.chinese: 她具有赛跑运动员的健美体型，而且精神焕发。

examples.english: Father Vic was a wiry man in his late forties with a sharp nose and deep-set eyes.
examples.chinese: 维克神父是个近50岁的瘦削男子，长着尖鼻子和深陷的眼睛。

examples.english: a wiry little Broadway show dancer from Puerto Rico
examples.chinese: 一名来自波多黎各的瘦小结实的百老汇戏剧舞蹈演员

centers.english: thin in a way that is not attractive

examples.english: a skinny kid with glasses
examples.chinese: 戴眼镜的皮包骨的小孩

examples.english: I was really skinny when I was a teenager.
examples.chinese: 我十几岁时非常瘦。

examples.english: Jacob placed his arm around her skinny shoulders.
examples.chinese: 雅各布搂住她瘦骨嶙峋的肩膀。

examples.english: Now that she was older, Jean's bony fingers and wrists were too small for her jewelry.
examples.chinese: 琼现在年纪大了，瘦骨嶙峋的手指和手腕戴她的那些首饰太小了。

examples.english: When I picked up the cat it felt as bony as a skeleton.
examples.chinese: 我把那只猫抱起来时，它摸上去瘦得像皮包骨。

examples.english: Kinsit, a naturally small woman with a thin, bony face, found gaining weight difficult.
examples.chinese: 金西特长了张又干又瘦的脸、天生的小身材，她觉得要增加体重很难。

examples.english: Last time I saw him he was a scrawny kid in Levi's and a dirty T-shirt.
examples.chinese: 上次我见到他时，他是个骨瘦如柴的孩子，穿着李维斯牛仔裤和肮脏的T恤衫。

examples.english: A few scrawny chickens were searching for scraps of food in the dry earth.
examples.chinese: 几只瘦巴巴的小鸡正在干旱的土地上寻找食物的零屑。

centers.english: too thin in a way that is unhealthy

examples.english: News came of the famine, and there were pictures of emaciated children on the TV.
examples.chinese: 传来了饥荒的消息，电视上也播出了瘦弱儿童的画面。

examples.english: Towards the end of his life he looked emaciated, his cheeks hollow and his eyes sunken.
examples.chinese: 在生命即将走到尽头时，他看上去面容枯槁、双颊和眼睛都凹陷下去了。

expressions.text: be nothing but/no more than skin and bone

examples.english: When she died she was nothing but skin and bone.
examples.chinese: 她去世时只剩皮包骨了。

examples.english: The poor dog was practically skin and bone.
examples.chinese: 这条可怜的狗瘦得几乎只剩下皮包骨。

examples.english: The doctor says that I'm underweight and has put me on a special diet.
examples.chinese: 医生说我体重不足并给我安排了特殊饮食。

examples.english: Women who consume large amounts of caffeine are more likely to give birth to underweight babies.
examples.chinese: 摄入大量咖啡因的女性更有可能产下体重不足的婴儿。

centers.english: having a thin face because you are very worried, tired etc
centers.chinese: 因担忧、疲劳等而脸庞瘦削的

examples.english: Her face was pale and drawn, and she seemed to have been crying.
examples.chinese: 她的面容苍白憔悴，像是哭过了。

examples.english: When Jack arrived he sat down slowly, his face drawn, with beads of sweat on his forehead.
examples.chinese: 杰克到了以后慢慢地坐下，他面容憔悴，前额上挂着汗珠。

examples.english: The doctor came out, looking drawn and exhausted.
examples.chinese: 医生出来了，面容憔悴，显得筋疲力尽。

examples.english: When I visited him in hospital Albert looked terrible -- his face was gaunt and his hair had turned grey.
examples.chinese: 我去医院看望艾伯特时，他看上去很糟糕——脸色苍白憔悴，头发也灰白了。

examples.english: The District Attorney at forty-four had the gaunt look of a man twenty years older.
examples.chinese: 44岁的地方检察官那副苍白憔悴的样子看上去要比实际年龄老20岁。

examples.english: The best way to lose weight is to eat less and do lots of exercise.
examples.chinese: 减肥的最佳办法是少吃、多运动。

examples.english: I'm really worried about my grandmother -- she's lost a lot of weight recently.
examples.chinese: 我非常担心祖母的身体，近来她体重大减。

examples.english: Alec lost seven pounds in a week and had to be re-admitted to the hospital.
examples.chinese: 亚历克一星期里瘦了7磅，只得再进医院。

examples.english: ‘Would you like some chocolate?’ ‘No thanks, I'm on a diet.’
examples.chinese: “你想来块巧克力吗？”“不了，谢谢。我在节食。”

examples.english: We're both going on a diet after Christmas.
examples.chinese: 圣诞节后我们俩都开始节食。

examples.english: She's really slimmed down a lot since I last saw her.
examples.chinese: 我上次见到她以后，她变得苗条多了。

expressions.text: slim down to eight stone/100 pounds etc

examples.english: He's trying to slim down to eleven stone.
examples.chinese: 他想把体重减到11英石。

examples.english: I'd like to shed a few pounds.
examples.chinese: 我想快快减掉几磅体重。

examples.english: Stone's doctor ordered him to shed some weight and quit smoking.
examples.chinese: 斯通的医生嘱咐他要快快减掉些体重并戒烟。

examples.english: Gascoigne has shed nearly 6 kilos in pre-season training and looks much fitter.
examples.chinese: 加斯科因在赛季前的训练中一下子减了差不多6公斤体重，看上去更强健了。

examples.english: There was nothing we could do -- she just wasted away and within six weeks she was dead.
examples.chinese: 我们毫无办法—她越来越衰弱，六星期后就去世了。

examples.english: His muscles were slowly wasting away because of his illness.
examples.chinese: 因为得了这种病，他的肌肉慢慢萎缩了。

examples.english: a thin slice of bread
examples.chinese: 一薄片面包

examples.english: In her pocket was a thin leather wallet containing six ten dollar bills.
examples.chinese: 她口袋里有一只薄薄的皮夹子，里面有六张十美元的钞票。

examples.english: The lake was covered with a thin layer of ice.
examples.chinese: 湖面上覆盖着一层薄冰。

examples.english: How do you get your sugar cookies so thin, Dagmar?
examples.chinese: 达格玛，你是怎么把甜饼干做得这么薄的？

examples.english: paper-thin slices of raw beef
examples.chinese: 一片片极薄的生牛肉

examples.english: The walls in this apartment are paper-thin; I can hear everything they're saying next door.
examples.chinese: 这个套间的墙壁极薄，隔壁房间里说的话我都听得清楚。

examples.english: Claude gave me a slim gold box for holding my business cards.
examples.chinese: 克劳德给我一个薄薄的金盒子来装我的名片。

examples.english: a slim volume of poetry
examples.chinese: 一本薄薄的诗集

examples.english: The roof is supported by thin iron columns.
examples.chinese: 屋顶由细长的铁柱支撑着。

examples.english: a thin blue line
examples.chinese: 一条细细的蓝线

examples.english: a wire as thin as a human hair
examples.chinese: 像一根头发那样细的电线

examples.english: The pictures are held in place by three slender brass rods.
examples.chinese: 这些画用三根细长的铜棒固定住。

examples.english: slender white candles
examples.chinese: 细长的白蜡烛

examples.english: A spider was hanging from a slender thread.
examples.chinese: 一只蜘蛛正挂在一根长长的细丝上。

examples.english: Martin wore a thin cotton shirt under his sweater.
examples.chinese: 马丁在套头毛衣里面穿了件薄薄的棉衬衫。

examples.english: It was a chilly night, and he had only a thin blanket for warmth.
examples.chinese: 那是个寒冷的晚上，他却只有一条薄薄的毯子御寒。

examples.english: fine china
examples.chinese: 精致的瓷器

examples.english: a fine chiffon veil with embroidered edges
examples.chinese: 一块边上刺绣的精致的薄绸面纱

examples.english: She took a light sweater, in case it was cool outside.
examples.chinese: 她带了件薄毛衣以防外面凉。

examples.english: In a warm climate people wear loose, lightweight clothing.
examples.chinese: 天暖时，人们穿上宽松轻薄的衣服。

examples.english: I don't think it'll be that cold - do you have anything more lightweight?
examples.chinese: 我觉得不至于会那么冷—你有薄一些的衣服吗？

examples.english: It was impossible for me to sleep under a single flimsy blanket on such a cold night.
examples.chinese: 这么冷的夜里我只盖一张薄薄的毯子是无法睡觉的。

examples.english: flimsy underwear
examples.chinese: 轻而薄的内衣

examples.english: Rubber gets thinner if you stretch it.
examples.chinese: 如果你把橡胶拉长它就变薄。

examples.english: The line of smoke grew thinner and thinner as it drifted up into the sky.
examples.chinese: 那缕烟飘上天空时变得越来越稀薄。

examples.english: The walls are 7 feet thick at the base and taper to 28 inches at the top.
examples.chinese: 墙的底部有7英尺厚，到墙顶时薄至28英寸。

examples.english: The human spine tapers off at its base.
examples.chinese: 人的脊柱向下逐渐变细。

examples.english: long tapering fingers
examples.chinese: 细长的手指

examples.english: I've been much healthier since I stopped smoking.
examples.chinese: 我戒烟之后身体健康多了。

examples.english: She's just had a lovely healthy baby girl.
examples.chinese: 她刚刚生了一个可爱健康的女婴。

examples.english: ‘How are you?’ ‘I'm very well, thank you.’
examples.chinese: “你身体怎么样？”“很好，谢谢。”

examples.english: Clare's been much better since the operation.
examples.chinese: 克莱尔手术之后身体好多了。

examples.english: You're looking well - have you been on holiday?
examples.chinese: 你气色很好——是不是休过假了？

examples.english: You need to eat regular nourishing meals if you want to keep yourself fit and well.
examples.chinese: 如果要保持身体健康，需要定时进餐，吃有营养的东西。

examples.english: ‘How are you?’ ‘Fine, thanks.’
examples.chinese: “你好吗？”“很好，谢谢。”

examples.english: ‘How's your wife now?’ ‘Oh, she's fine, thank you.’
examples.chinese: “你妻子现在怎么样？”“噢，她很好，谢谢。

examples.english: The hostages arrived back in Britain yesterday, tired but otherwise in good health.
examples.chinese: 昨天人质回到英国，虽然疲倦，身体状况倒是不错。

examples.english: My grandmother remained in excellent health until she was in her nineties.
examples.chinese: 我祖母直到九十多岁还依然有很好的身体。

examples.english: He's nearly 60 now but he's strong and healthy and full of energy.
examples.chinese: 现在他已年近60，但身体健壮，精力充沛。

examples.english: Her death came as a terrible shock. She had always been so healthy.
examples.chinese: 她的死太令人震惊了。她一向都是那么健康。

examples.english: Eating plenty of fresh fruit and vegetables will help you to stay healthy.
examples.chinese: 多吃新鲜水果和蔬菜可以帮助你保持身体健康。

examples.english: My father's over eighty now, and not very strong.
examples.chinese: 我父亲现在八十多岁了，身体不是很健壮。

examples.english: Only people who are physically strong and fit should consider coming on this expedition.
examples.chinese: 只有身体强健的人才可考虑参加这次探险活动。

examples.english: Your husband has an excellent constitution and is likely to recover in no time.
examples.chinese: 你丈夫体质很好，很快就会康复的。

examples.english: Her injuries were horrifying. Only her determination and robust constitution pulled her through.
examples.chinese: 她的伤势很严重，只是凭着坚强的意志和强壮的体格才挺过来的。

examples.english: He was a robust little boy, with curly dark hair.
examples.chinese: 他是个健壮的小男孩，有着一头黑色的发。

examples.english: Paul travelled north to visit his parents, who he found less robust than before.
examples.chinese: 保罗北上探望父母，他发现他们不如以前健壮了。

examples.english: Two healthy-looking suntanned kids were playing in the driveway.
examples.chinese: 两个看上去很健康、皮肤晒得黑黑的孩子正在车道上玩耍。

examples.english: Even the most healthy-looking person could be carrying HIV.
examples.chinese: 即使是看上去最健康的人也可能会携带艾滋病病毒。

examples.english: The baby lay in her father's arms, a picture of health and contentment.
examples.chinese: 那婴儿躺在她父亲的怀里，看上去很健康，很满足。

examples.english: In spite of all her complaints, Jilly looked the picture of health.
examples.chinese: 吉莉尽管有很多小毛病，但看上去很健康。

centers.english: how healthy or unhealthy you are

examples.english: Linda's one of those people who always seem to be worrying about their health.
examples.chinese: 琳达是那种老是担心自己身体不好的人。

examples.english: Pollution in the atmosphere causes serious health problems for many people.
examples.chinese: 大气污染给许多人带来严重的健康问题。

examples.english: Too much stress is likely to affect both your mental and physical health.
examples.chinese: 压力太大可能会影响你的身心健康。

examples.english: There's no reason why you shouldn't continue working until you're 70 or over, if you're in good health.
examples.chinese: 如果身体条件好，你没有理由不工作到70岁或70岁以上。

examples.english: For most animals, a shiny coat is a sign of health.
examples.chinese: 对于大多数动物，一身光亮的皮毛是健康的象征。

examples.english: Your health is more important than any amount of money.
examples.chinese: 健康比多少钱都来得重要。

examples.english: A warm home is essential to the wellbeing of elderly people.
examples.chinese: 一个温暖的家对于老人的安康来说是至关重要的。

examples.english: Samuel Roberts was a large man in his fifties who exuded physical wellbeing and self confidence.
examples.chinese: 塞缪尔·罗伯茨是一个50岁左右的大块头男人，身体健康，充满自信。

examples.english: It's a relaxing treatment that should leave you calm with a sense of wellbeing.
examples.chinese: 这是一种能让人感到放松的疗法，应该可以使你平静，有一种健康的感觉。

examples.english: In Denmark, regular health visiting promotes wellness by developing healthier children.
examples.chinese: 在丹麦，定期的健康随访使儿童更加健康地成长，从而提高了国民的身体素质。

examples.english: The institute trains people to manage wellness programs for industries, schools, communities and hospitals.
examples.chinese: 这个学院为人们提供培训，给企业、学校、社区和医院管理健康计划。

centers.english: something that makes or keeps you healthy
centers.chinese: 使你健康或使你保持健康的事物

examples.english: Taking plenty of exercise can be both healthy and enjoyable.
examples.chinese: 多运动既有利于身体健康，又有乐趣。

examples.english: I'm trying to eat a healthier diet now, with less fat and sugar.
examples.chinese: 我现在尽量保持健康的饮食，少吃脂肪和糖。

examples.english: a healthy outdoor life
examples.chinese: 健康的户外生活

expressions.text: be good for you/be good for your health

examples.english: Citrus fruits such as oranges and lemons are very good for you.
examples.chinese: 橙子、柠檬等柑橘类水果对身体非常好。

examples.english: I can't see how gazing at a crystal is in any way good for your health.
examples.chinese: 我看不出盯着看一块水晶对身体会有什么好处。

examples.english: I love junkfood but I know it's not good for me.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢吃垃圾食品，但我知道这对我身体是不好的。

examples.english: I thought that a vacation would do me good.
examples.chinese: 我想休假对我会有好处。

examples.english: Let's ask Jean to come tonight.. It might do her good to meet some new people.
examples.chinese: 今天晚上我们叫琼来吧，让她认识一些新朋友对她有好处。

expressions.text: do somebody the world of good

examples.english: What you need is a good night out - it'd do you the world of good!
examples.chinese: 你需要的是出去好好玩一个晚上一肯定对你大有好处！

examples.english: ‘Rosie's Pantry’ is a small restaurant that serves good wholesome food.
examples.chinese: “罗茜小厨”是一家小饭馆，供应美味健康的食品。

examples.english: Quality controllers ensure that all our products are safe, wholesome, and of good quality.
examples.chinese: 质量检验员确保我们所有产品都安全健康、品质良好。

examples.english: Brown bread is more nutritious than white.
examples.chinese: 黑面包比白面包更有营养。

examples.english: I eat a lot of beans, lentils and vegetables, which are nutritious but cheap.
examples.chinese: 我吃许多豆子、小扁豆和蔬菜，这些东西营养丰富且价格便宜。

examples.english: Milk is a very nutritious food, containing protein, vitamins and minerals.
examples.chinese: 牛奶是很有营养的食品，含有蛋白质、维生素和矿物质。

examples.english: A simple chicken soup is both nourishing and delicious.
examples.chinese: 简简单单的鸡汤既有营养又美味可口。

examples.english: Preparing good nourishing family meals was a challenge with eight mouths to feed.
examples.chinese: 要做出有营养又可口的饭菜给一个八口之家吃很不容易。

examples.english: The Centre is open throughout the year, to ensure that homeless people can get at least one hot, nourishing meal a day.
examples.chinese: 该中心终年开放，确保无家可归的人每天至少能吃上一顿有营养的热饭。

examples.english: The American breakfast is getting more healthful, with whole-grain breads and high-fiber cereals.
examples.chinese: 美国人的早餐越来越健康，有全麦面包和高纤维的谷物食品。

examples.english: Our research group found that consumers want healthful food based on vegetables not meat products.
examples.chinese: 我们的研究小组发现，消费者希望吃到蔬菜类的健康食品，而不是肉类产品。

examples.english: The occasional glass of wine is both enjoyable and beneficial.
examples.chinese: 偶尔喝一杯葡萄酒既令人愉快，又能增进健康。

examples.english: This treatment can be very beneficial, especially to young children.
examples.chinese: 这种疗法对健康非常有利，尤其是幼儿。

examples.english: James was a thin, pale, unhealthy child.
examples.chinese: 詹姆斯是个瘦弱、苍白、不健康的孩子。

examples.english: People who are very overweight tend to be more unhealthy than others.
examples.chinese: 很肥胖的人一般都不如其他人健康。

examples.english: At the age of 30 I was fat, unhealthy, and smoked two packs of cigarettes a day.
examples.chinese: 我30岁的时候长得很胖，身体也不健康，每天都抽两包香烟。

centers.english: something that is bad for your health

expressions.text: be bad for you/be bad for your health

examples.english: Children always seem to love food that's bad for them - ice-cream, sugar, burgers.
examples.chinese: 小孩子好像都喜欢对身体有害的食物—冰淇淋、糖、汉堡包。

examples.english: Everyone knows that smoking is bad for your health.
examples.chinese: 人人都知道吸烟有害健康。

examples.english: He has such an unhealthy lifestyle -- smoking, drinking, eating too much.
examples.chinese: 他的生活方式很不健康—抽烟、喝酒、吃得太多。

examples.english: An unhealthy diet is one that is too high in fat and sugar and too low in fibre.
examples.chinese: 不健康的饮食就是糖和脂肪含量太高，纤维含量太低。

examples.english: My mother thought it was unhealthy to sleep with the windows shut at night.
examples.chinese: 我母亲认为晚上关着窗睡觉有害健康。

examples.english: The new air pollution controls are designed to limit harmful emissions from industry and motor vehicles.
examples.chinese: 新的空气污染控制措施是为了限制工业和机动车辆的有害气体排放而设计的。

examples.english: You should always use sunscreen to protect your skin from the harmful effects of the sun.
examples.chinese: 一定要使用防晒霜来保护皮肤不受太阳的伤害。

examples.english: As yet there is no proof that genetically modified foods are harmful to humans.
examples.chinese: 到目前为止还没有证据表明转基因食物对人类有害。

examples.english: Avoid too much exposure to damaging ultraviolet light.
examples.chinese: 避免受到有害紫外线的过度照射。

examples.english: X-rays can be extremely damaging to living cells.
examples.chinese: X射线可对活细胞产生很大的破坏性。

centers.english: when clothes are the right size

expressions.gram: intransitive/transitive verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: He's put on so much weight that his clothes don't fit any more.
examples.chinese: 他体重增加了这么多，衣服都穿不下了。

examples.english: Do these shoes still fit you?
examples.chinese: 这双鞋子你还穿得下吗？

examples.english: The pants were a little tight at first, but after I wore them a few times, they fit like a glove.
examples.chinese: 这条裤子一开始有点紧，但我穿过几次后就很合身了。

examples.english: Why don't you try it on to see if it's the right size?
examples.chinese: 为什么不试穿一下，看看大小是否合适呢？

examples.english: They had the jacket I wanted and it was just the right size too.
examples.chinese: 他们有我要的夹克衫，而且尺码也正好。

examples.english: Are you sure those shoes are the right size for Bill?
examples.chinese: 你肯定那双鞋子给比尔穿大小正好吗？

examples.english: The suit was a good fit, but I didn't like the pattern.
examples.chinese: 那套衣服穿着非常合身，不过我不喜欢那种花样。

examples.english: I had to guess what size she was, but fortunately the dress was a good fit.
examples.chinese: 我只好猜她的尺寸大小，幸亏这件连衣裙正合适。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: I know the sweater's too big for Jenny, but she'll soon grow into it.
examples.chinese: 我知道这件毛衣珍妮穿还太大了些，但她很快就会长大，那时就合身了。

centers.english: when clothes are not the right size

expressions.gram: intransitive/transitive verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: If the boots don't fit, we can return them tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 假如靴子大小不合适，明天我们可以去退货。

examples.english: There was nothing wrong with the coat - we took it back to the shop because it didn't fit her.
examples.chinese: 这件外套没什么地方不好，只是她穿着不合身，我们就把它退还给商店了。

examples.english: You can't wear your father's suit, it's far too big.
examples.chinese: 你不能穿父亲的衣服，那太大了。

examples.english: I have to buy Tim some new sandals. The ones he's wearing are too small.
examples.chinese: 我得给蒂姆买双新的凉鞋。他穿的那双太小了。

examples.english: Those jeans must be two sizes too big for you.
examples.chinese: 那条牛仔裤你穿肯定大两号。

examples.english: I bought him a shirt, but it wasn't the right size.
examples.chinese: 我给他买了件衬衫，可尺寸不合适。

expressions.text: not be the right size for

examples.english: That sweater won't be the right size for him -- he'll need an extra-large.
examples.chinese: 那件毛线衫他穿尺寸不对，他要穿特大号的。

examples.english: I don't wear my black dress very much. It's very tight around the waist.
examples.chinese: 我不大穿这条黑色的连衣裙，腰口很紧。

examples.english: If your shirt collar's too tight, undo your top button.
examples.chinese: 如果衬衫领口太紧，就把第一颗纽扣解开。

examples.english: I put on five pounds over Christmas and now I can't get into these jeans.
examples.chinese: 我圣诞期间体重增加了五磅，现在这条牛仔裤穿不下了。

centers.english: to be the right size for a particular space
centers.chinese: 对某一空间而言尺寸正合适

examples.english: We didn't know if the carpet would fit in the bedroom, but it turned out to be just the right size.
examples.chinese: 我们原先也不知道这张地毯铺在卧室是否合适，结果大小刚好。

examples.english: Do you think this bulb is the right size for the lamp?
examples.chinese: 你认为这只灯泡配这灯大小合适吗？

expressions.gram: intransitive/transitive verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: We were going to put the fridge between the stove and the washing machine, but it wouldn't fit.
examples.chinese: 我们本来打算把冰箱放在炉子和洗衣机中间，可放不下。

examples.english: Does your key fit the lock on the garage door?
examples.chinese: 你的钥匙能开车库的门锁吗？

examples.english: Will this bag fit in the trunk?
examples.chinese: 这个袋子能放进箱子吗?

examples.english: We've designed a computer that fits into an ordinary briefcase.
examples.chinese: 我们已设计了一种能装进普通公文包内的电脑。

examples.english: It's no good trying to force it, it just won't go.
examples.chinese: 硬挤没用，这儿放不下。

examples.english: Do you think the car will go in that parking space?
examples.chinese: 你觉得这辆车能停进那个停车位吗？

examples.english: I've measured the space, and with a bit of luck, the washing machine should just about go into it.
examples.chinese: 这地方我量了一下，如果运气好，洗衣机应该刚刚放得进去。

centers.english: to be almost too big to fit into a space
centers.chinese: 对某个地方来说太大了一点，几乎进不去

examples.english: The tunnel was so narrow that only one person at a time could squeeze into it.
examples.chinese: 隧道非常窄，一次只能挤过去一个人。

examples.english: I squeezed through a hole in the hedge into the garden.
examples.chinese: 我挤过树篱的一个洞进了花园。

examples.english: The bus was already full but someone opened the doors and another passenger squeezed in.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车已经客满，可是有人开了车门，又挤进了一个乘客。

examples.english: It'll be a squeeze but I think we can get everyone into Stephen's car.
examples.chinese: 需要挤一挤，但我认为我们能让每个人都挤进斯蒂芬的车。

examples.english: We got everything into the suitcase, but it was a tight squeeze.
examples.chinese: 我们把所有东西都放进了手提箱，但塞得很挤。

examples.english: Sandy's very fit - he runs five miles every day.
examples.chinese: 桑迪很强健，他每天跑五英里。

examples.english: Just because you're in your sixties doesn't mean you can't be physically fit.
examples.chinese: 你年过六旬并不意味你不能保持身体健康。

examples.english: Cycling is a good way to keep fit.
examples.chinese: 骑自行车是保持强健的好方法。

examples.english: We've got a match next month, so we've got to keep ourselves reasonably fit.
examples.chinese: 下个月我们有场比赛，因此我们得把体能保持得不错。

examples.english: I stay fit by swimming for an hour each morning.
examples.chinese: 我每天早晨游泳一小时来保持强健。

examples.english: I began running about a month ago to improve my physical fitness.
examples.chinese: 一个月前我开始跑步来提高体能。

examples.english: The magazine contained several articles about healthy eating, fitness, and exercise.
examples.chinese: 这本杂志有几篇关于健康饮食、身体健康和锻炼的文章。

examples.english: I'll start playing basketball with you as soon as I'm in shape.
examples.chinese: 我身体状况一好就和你一起打篮球。

examples.english: She's in pretty good shape but I don't know if she'll be able to run a marathon.
examples.chinese: 她身体很好，但我不知道她能否跑马拉松。

examples.english: Walking to and from work helps me to stay in shape.
examples.chinese: 走路上下班有助于我保持良好的身体。

examples.english: He's good at badminton but plays handball to keep in shape.
examples.chinese: 他很擅长打羽毛球，但他打手球以保持强健。

examples.english: We were both good runners and in good condition but we still found the course difficult.
examples.chinese: 我们俩都很善跑，身体也好，可还是觉得这比赛的场地很难跑。

examples.english: Most of the players had kept themselves in good condition over the summer months.
examples.chinese: 大多数球员在夏季都使自己的身体保持良好的状态。

examples.english: He can play any sport, he's naturally athletic.
examples.chinese: 他什么体育运动都会，他天生就擅长运动。

examples.english: If you want me to play, I will, but I'm not very athletic.
examples.chinese: 如果你要我玩，那我就玩，可我不是很善于运动。

examples.english: I realised how unfit I was when I tried to run up the stairs.
examples.chinese: 我想跑上楼梯时意识到自己的身体是多么的虚弱。

examples.english: The survey shows that the typical 16-year-old is unfit, lazy, and probably plays no sports at all.
examples.chinese: 这次调查表明一般16岁的孩子身体孱弱、懒惰，很有可能根本不运动。

expressions.text: not be in shape/be out of shape/be out of condition

examples.english: He knew that he was out of condition and it would be risky to attempt the climb.
examples.chinese: 他知道自己身体状况不好，爬那座山可能很危险。

examples.english: I've been really out of shape since I stopped running every day.
examples.chinese: 自从我停止每天跑步以来，我身体状况就很差了。

examples.english: Mel was so ill that she had to stay in bed for a month.
examples.chinese: 梅尔病得很厉害，不得不卧床一个月。

examples.english: Apparently Don's wife is seriously ill, and they think it might be cancer.
examples.chinese: 唐的妻子显然病得很重，他们认为可能是癌症。

examples.english: The baby caught a virus and became critically ill.
examples.chinese: 婴儿感染了病毒，病情严重。

examples.english: psychological support for terminally ill patients
examples.chinese: 对绝症病人的心理支持

examples.english: Mentally ill patients have the same rights as anyone else.
examples.chinese: 患精神病的人与别人享有同样的权利。

examples.english: All that week, Catherine lay ill, drifting in and out of consciousness.
examples.chinese: 整整一个星期凯瑟琳卧病在床，处于半昏迷状态。

examples.english: Tuesday's game had to be cancelled because of illness.
examples.chinese: 由于有参赛者生病，星期二的比赛被迫取消。

examples.english: Where's Mary today? I hope she's not sick again.
examples.chinese: 玛丽今天在哪里？我希望她别又生病了。

examples.english: Sheila spent months looking after her sick mother.
examples.chinese: 希拉几个月里一直在照顾她患病的母亲。

examples.english: Gary phoned to say that he's off sick today.
examples.chinese: 加里来电话说他今天生病不来了。

expressions.text: be off work sick/be in bed sick

examples.english: I'm sorry I didn't reply to your e-mail. I was in bed sick for a couple of days.
examples.chinese: 很抱歉我没回你的电子邮件，我卧病在床好几天了。

expressions.text: sick with the flu/a virus etc

examples.english: Grant Hill played despite being sick with the flu for the past ten days.
examples.chinese: 尽管过去十天来一直患感冒，格兰特·希尔还是参加了比赛。

examples.english: We were dirty, hungry, cold and sick with exhaustion.
examples.chinese: 我们又脏，又饿，又冷，感到筋疲力尽。

examples.english: On average, companies lose twelve days per employee per year as a result of sickness.
examples.chinese: 由于生病，公司平均每年在每位雇员身上损失12天。

examples.english: Sarah's not very well - she's got a throat infection.
examples.chinese: 萨拉不太舒服—她的喉咙感染了。

examples.english: Jed's Mum says he's not well, so he's staying at home today.
examples.chinese: 杰德的母亲说他身体不舒服，所以今天待在家里。

examples.english: Mrs Hedges is unwell today, so her class will be taken by Mr Collier.
examples.chinese: 赫奇斯太太今天不舒服，因此她的课由科利尔先生代上。

examples.english: Tom had been unwell for some time but had refused to see a doctor.
examples.chinese: 汤姆身体不适已有一段时间，但他不肯去看医生。

examples.english: Dad was always out, Mum was often poorly, and I had to look after the rest of the kids.
examples.chinese: 爸爸整天在外面，妈妈经常身体不好，我只好照顾其余几个小孩子。

examples.english: ‘I'm afraid your grandmother's very poorly,’ the nurse on duty said.
examples.chinese: “恐怕你祖母身体很不好。”值班护士说。

examples.english: You'd better get an ambulance - she's in a pretty bad way.
examples.chinese: 最好马上叫救护车，她伤得很重。

examples.english: Martin came back from Africa with malaria, and he was in a pretty bad way for months.
examples.chinese: 马丁在非洲染上了疟疾回来，好几个月来病得很重。

expressions.text: look like death warmed up /death warmed ove

examples.english: Kate didn't sleep a wink last night. She looks like death warmed up.
examples.chinese: 凯特昨晚一夜未合眼，形容憔悴。

examples.english: Boy, you look like death warmed over this morning!
examples.chinese: 我的天，你今天早晨看上去像是得了大病一样！

examples.english: I hear you've been a bit under the weather. Are you feeling better now?
examples.chinese: 听说你不太舒服。现在好点了吗？

examples.english: Mike's feeling a little under the weather so he couldn't come tonight.
examples.chinese: 迈克有点不舒服，所以他今晚不能来了。

examples.english: I'm fine, thank you, but Elinor's a bit off colour at the moment.
examples.chinese: 我很好，谢谢你，但埃莉诺此刻有点不适。

examples.english: Bruce went to the doctor, feeling a little off colour, and was told that he had anaemia.
examples.chinese: 布鲁斯感到身体不舒服就去看医生，结果得知自己得了贫血症。

examples.english: You're run down -- you need a vacation.
examples.chinese: 你太累了—需要休假。

examples.english: A lot of people feel run down in the winter months, when the days are short and there's very little sunlight.
examples.chinese: 许多人在冬季几个月里会觉得很疲惫，那个时节白天短，日光少。

examples.english: He was a sickly child with a bad chest and a permanent cough.
examples.chinese: 他是个多病的孩子，肺部很弱，咳嗽不断。

examples.english: Louise, who was often sickly, couldn't join in the other children's games.
examples.chinese: 路易斯常常生病，无法参与其他孩子的游戏。

examples.english: Clare was more active than her brother, who had always been a delicate child.
examples.chinese: 克莱尔比她的弟弟活跃，他一向体弱多病。

examples.english: Mr Humphreys’ wife was delicate - the doctor was called in once or twice a week.
examples.chinese: 汉弗莱斯先生的妻子体弱多病，每周要请医生一两次。

examples.english: When he left Trinidad he was already over 60, frail, and in poor health.
examples.chinese: 离开特立尼达时他已经60多岁，身体虚弱，经常生病。

examples.english: She lives with her grandmother who is elderly and infirm.
examples.chinese: 她与年老体弱的祖母住在一起。

examples.english: The "Meals on Wheels’ service delivers food to the old and infirm.
examples.chinese: “汽车送饭”服务把食物给上了年纪和身体不好的人送上门。

examples.english: As a child she had always been prone to allergies.
examples.chinese: 小时候，她易于过敏。

examples.english: The disease had left her weak and prone to all kinds of infections.
examples.chinese: 生了这场病以后，她身体虚弱，容易受各种感染。

centers.english: someone who imagines they are ill

examples.english: Don't be such a hypochondriac - it's only a cold!
examples.chinese: 别这样疑神疑鬼—你不过是得了感冒！

examples.english: She's a bit of a hypochondriac - always looking up her minor illnesses in a medical book.
examples.chinese: 她有点像疑病症患者，总是为了一点小毛小病就去翻查医学书。

examples.english: ‘Do you feel ill, darling?’ asked Rosie anxiously.
examples.chinese: “亲爱的，你觉得不舒服吗？”罗西关切地问道。

examples.english: I was feeling ill, so I went home.
examples.chinese: 我觉得自己生病了，于是就回了家。

examples.english: Mark said he felt sick, so I've made an appointment with the doctor.
examples.chinese: 马克说他觉得不舒服，所以我就约了医生。

expressions.text: not feel (very) well/not feel too good

examples.english: If you don't feel well the best thing to do is to stay in bed.
examples.chinese: 如果你觉得不舒服，最好的办法就是躺在床上。

examples.english: ‘I don't feel very well,’ said Jamie, suddenly going very pale.
examples.chinese: “我觉得不太舒服，”杰米说道，他的脸色突然变得非常苍白。

examples.english: Ben's not feeling good this morning. I think it's something he ate.
examples.chinese: 今天早上本觉得不舒服，我想他是吃了什么东西了。

examples.english: No, I don't think I'll be coming out tonight. I'm not feeling too good.
examples.chinese: 不了，我想今晚我来不了，我觉得不太舒服。

examples.english: I felt a bit funny and dizzy, and then the next thing I knew I was lying on the floor.
examples.chinese: 我觉得有点不舒服和头晕，等到恢复知觉时我已躺在了地上。

examples.english: Don't get up if you're feeling rough - I'll bring you some breakfast in bed.
examples.chinese: 如果觉得身体不好就别起来了，我给你把早餐拿到床上吃吧。

examples.english: Liz said she was feeling pretty rough yesterday -- I don't think she'll come to work today.
examples.chinese: 莉兹昨天说她很不舒服—我想她今天不来上班了。

expressions.text: feel sick /feel sick to your stomac

examples.english: We'd only been in the car two minutes when David said he felt sick.
examples.chinese: 我们刚坐进车里两分钟，戴维就说自己感到恶心。

examples.english: When I was pregnant, the smell of coffee made me feel sick to my stomach.
examples.chinese: 我怀孕时，咖啡的气味会让我觉得要呕吐。

examples.english: You shouldn't drive after taking these pills. They're likely to make you feel groggy.
examples.chinese: 你吃过这些药片就不应该开车了，它们会使你感到神智模糊。

examples.english: I went to see Sally in hospital, but she was still groggy from the anaesthetic.
examples.chinese: 我去医院看望萨莉了，但她因麻醉仍有些昏昏沉沉的。

examples.english: It was a very hot day, and I suddenly felt faint and sick.
examples.chinese: 那天很热，我忽然感觉晕厥不适。

examples.english: If at any time you feel faint or nauseous, stop taking the tablets.
examples.chinese: 你一旦感到头晕或恶心，就停止服药。

examples.english: It's horrible when you get ill on holiday.
examples.chinese: 在假日里生病真是糟糕。

examples.english: If you take vitamin C every day, it helps to stop you getting sick.
examples.chinese: 如果你每天服用维生素C，会帮助你免于得病。

examples.english: My father first became ill when I was 12, and died a few months later.
examples.chinese: 在我12岁时，父亲患了病，几个月后便去世了。

examples.english: People were scared of becoming sick because they couldn't pay the doctor's bills.
examples.chinese: 人们很害怕生病，因为他们支付不起医疗费用。

examples.english: If you live alone, you often wonder who would look after you if you fell ill.
examples.chinese: 如果你独自生活就常会担心一旦病倒谁来照顾你。

examples.english: New Year's Eve revellers fell sick after drinking an orange liquid at a downtown ‘rave’ party.
examples.chinese: 除夕的狂欢者在城里的一个“狂欢聚会”上喝了一种橙色饮料后感到不适。

examples.english: It was the first time the president had been back to his office since falling ill with pneumonia in January.
examples.chinese: 这是自1月份总统患肺炎病倒后第一次回到他的办公室。

examples.english: I heard that her sister had been taken ill and rushed to hospital.
examples.chinese: 我听说她姐姐病了，被紧急送到了医院。

examples.english: The band cut short their tour after singer Robert Smith was taken ill with severe stomach pains.
examples.chinese: 歌手罗伯特·史密斯肚子剧痛病倒后，乐队就中止了他们的巡回演出。

examples.english: St Dominic's Hospital treats about 10,000 patients a year.
examples.chinese: 圣多米尼克医院每年治疗的病人约为10，000人。

examples.english: He gave a half million pound donation towards the care of AIDs patients.
examples.chinese: 他捐赠了50万英镑帮助照顾艾滋病人。

examples.english: Clinical trials show that some patients with breast cancer do better if they take the drug for five years after surgery.
examples.chinese: 临床试验显示，一些患乳癌的病人如果手术后服用这种药五年便能取得较好的效果。

examples.english: Lupus is a disease of the immune system and nine out of ten sufferers are women.
examples.chinese: 狼疮是一种免疫系统疾病，患者中十分之九是女性。

examples.english: The health centre runs a support group for Parkinson's disease sufferers.
examples.chinese: 保健中心为帕金森氏病患者组建了一个支援团体。

examples.english: Summer can be a nightmare for hay fever sufferers.
examples.chinese: 夏天对于花粉病人来说可能会是一场噩梦。

examples.english: Many sufferers from depression struggle on for years before seeking help.
examples.chinese: 许多抑郁症患者挣扎多年后才寻求帮助。

examples.english: My father's an invalid, and needs constant care.
examples.chinese: 我爸爸是卧床病人，随时需要照料。

examples.english: Barbara decided to move her invalid mother to Mississippi, so that she could look after her herself.
examples.chinese: 芭芭拉决定把久病卧床的母亲搬到密西西比，以便可以亲自照顾她。

examples.english: At that time there were no state benefits for the old and the sick.
examples.chinese: 那时候老年人和病人是没有国家发放的福利金的。

examples.english: terrible wartime photographs of the sick and the dying
examples.chinese: 战争时期拍下的那些病人和垂死者的恐怖照片

examples.english: Keith's had a particularly nasty form of the illness - he's even been throwing up with it.
examples.chinese: 基思得的那种病症状特别严重—他甚至还呕吐。

examples.english: One of my worst memories is of being sick in school assembly.
examples.chinese: 我最痛苦的记忆之一就是在学校早会上呕吐。

examples.english: Just thinking about it makes me want to throw up.
examples.chinese: 想起这我就想吐。

examples.english: The dog's been sick all over the carpet.
examples.chinese: 小狗吐得地毯上到处都是。

examples.english: I tried giving him some cool, boiled water, but he even threw that up.
examples.chinese: 我想让他喝点凉开水，可他连这也吐了。

examples.english: If she starts vomiting, contact the doctor immediately.
examples.chinese: 如果她开始呕吐就立即与医生联系。

examples.english: The car seat was covered with vomit.
examples.chinese: 汽车座位上全是呕吐物。

examples.english: Morrison died after choking on his own vomit.
examples.chinese: 莫里森是呕吐的时候呛死的。

examples.english: It smells like someone puked in here.
examples.chinese: 那气味好像有人在这儿吐过。

examples.english: I could barely stand up without barfing.
examples.chinese: 我几乎是一站起来就要吐。

examples.english: It is quite normal for your baby to bring up some milk after feeding.
examples.chinese: 宝宝喂奶后要呕出一些，这是很正常的。

examples.english: ‘Did you try giving him steamed fish?’ ‘Yes, but he brought it all up again.’
examples.chinese: “你给他吃蒸鱼了吗？”“是的，可他又全吐了。”

examples.english: The chicks will feed on the partially-digested food regurgitated by the parent.
examples.chinese: 这些雏鸟吃的是雌鸟反刍吐出的半消化食物。

examples.english: He was doubled over in pain, gasping and retching as if his insides were on fire.
examples.chinese: 他痛得腰都直不起来，又是喘气又是干呕，那样子就像他的五脏六腑被火烧似的。

examples.english: The stench from the bed was enough to make Detective Saunders heave.
examples.chinese: 床上的那股恶臭让桑德斯侦探恶心不已。

examples.english: I could hardly eat the fish without gagging.
examples.chinese: 我一吃这鱼就恶心。

examples.english: Janir took a sip of the medicine and gagged at the vile taste.
examples.chinese: 贾尼尔喝了一口药，那难吃的味道让他直反胃。

examples.english: Joe gagged on his first cigarette, red-faced and choking.
examples.chinese: 乔抽了第一口烟后就想吐，他满脸通红，呛个不已。

centers.english: when you think you are going to vomit

expressions.text: feel sick/ feel sick to your stomach

examples.english: If you feel sick, there's the bowl, okay?
examples.chinese: 如果你感到恶心，这里有碗，行吗?

examples.english: I had no urge to smoke when I was pregnant. It made me feel sick to my stomach.
examples.chinese: 我怀孕时一点不想抽烟，闻到烟我就恶心反胃。
