examples.english: He developed a severe headache and felt very sick by day three.
examples.chinese: 到了第三天，他头痛得厉害，而且觉得非常恶心。

examples.english: He felt queasy as soon as the boat started to move.
examples.chinese: 船一开动他就感到头晕恶心。

examples.english: Just the thought of all that food's made me feel quite queasy.
examples.chinese: 只要一想到那些食物我就恶心。

examples.english: Cancer drugs often have unpleasant side effects, such as nausea and loss of hair.
examples.chinese: 抗癌药物通常有不良的副作用，如恶心、掉头发。

examples.english: Nausea swept over me as I looked at the body of the dead boy.
examples.chinese: 看到那男孩的尸体，我感到一阵恶心。

expressions.text: be going to throw up/ be going to be sick

examples.english: ‘I think I'm going to be sick,’ said a small voice from the back of the classroom.
examples.chinese: “我觉得要吐了。”教室后面有个小小的声音说道。

examples.english: You look very pale -- you're not going to throw up are you?
examples.chinese: 你看上去脸色苍白一—不会要吐吧？

centers.english: the physical condition of being sick

examples.english: Symptoms include dizziness, vomiting and headache.
examples.chinese: 症状有头晕、呕吐以及头痛。

examples.english: Persistent vomiting can lead to dehydration.
examples.chinese: 持续呕吐会导致脱水。

examples.english: Morning sickness usually disappears after the third month of pregnancy.
examples.chinese: 怀孕第三个月之后，晨吐的现象一般都会消失。

examples.english: She died yesterday after a long illness.
examples.chinese: 她病了很久，于昨天去世。

examples.english: People are often too embarrassed to admit that they have suffered from any form of mental illness.
examples.chinese: 人们经常羞于承认自己患有任何一种精神疾病。

examples.english: 80% of patients now recover completely from this illness and are able to lead perfectly normal lives.
examples.chinese: 现在，这种疾病的患者有80%能完全康复，过上完全正常的生活。

examples.english: Doctors believe he may have contracted the illness while he was in Africa.
examples.chinese: 医生认为他可能在非洲时染上了这种病。

examples.english: Minor illnesses such as colds are usually best left to get better by themselves.
examples.chinese: 像感冒这种小病一般最好让它自己好起来。

examples.english: Should doctors always tell patients that they have terminal illnesses such as cancer?
examples.chinese: 医生是不是总应把病人患上绝症，譬如癌症的消息告诉他们呢?

examples.english: You are allowed time off work only in cases of serious illness or bereavement.
examples.chinese: 只有在患重病或家人去世的情况下你才可以请假不来上班。

examples.english: The most common symptoms of the disease are a high temperature and spots all over the body.
examples.chinese: 这种疾病最常见的症状是发高烧，全身起丘疹。

examples.english: Thousands of people in this area are dying from hunger and disease.
examples.chinese: 本地区有数以千计的人正死于饥饿和疾病。

examples.english: Anyone can catch the disease -- not just homosexual men or drug addicts.
examples.chinese: 人人都可能染上这种病——不只是男性同性恋者或吸毒者。

examples.english: She suffers from a rare disease of the nervous system.
examples.chinese: 她患了一种罕见的神经系统的疾病。

examples.english: Travellers to India are advised to get vaccinated against infectious diseases such as typhoid before they go.
examples.chinese: 建议去印度旅行的人在出发前打疫苗以防止染上伤寒等传染病。

examples.english: Childhood diseases such as measles and chickenpox are highly contagious.
examples.chinese: 小儿疾病如麻疹和天花经接触传染，传染性很高。

examples.english: Malaria is still a common disease in West Africa and is often fatal.
examples.chinese: 疟疾在西非仍是一种常见病，而且常常会致命。

examples.english: Smoking is a major cause of heart disease.
examples.chinese: 吸烟是引起心脏疾病的一个主要原因。

examples.english: the virus that causes the common cold
examples.chinese: 引发普通感冒的病毒！

examples.english: He could be carrying the AIDS virus.
examples.chinese: 他有可能携带艾滋病病毒。

examples.english: It is estimated that over thirty million people are now infected with the virus.
examples.chinese: 据估计有三千多万人现已受到这种病毒的感染。

examples.english: a vaccine which protects against Hepatitis B, a highly infectious virus which is transmitted sexually or by sharing infected needles.
examples.chinese: 一种防止感染乙型肝炎的疫苗，乙型肝炎是通过性行为或共用受感染的注射针传染的高感染性病毒

examples.english: She thinks she picked up some kind of mystery virus while she was on vacation.
examples.chinese: 她觉得自己在度假时染上了某种神秘的病毒。

examples.english: I think I've picked up the bug that's been going round the office.
examples.chinese: 我想自己是得了在办公室里传来传去的那种小毛病。

examples.english: Gemima's been off school with a tummy bug this week.
examples.chinese: 杰米玛这星期由于肚子不舒服而没有上课。

examples.english: Young schoolkids are always catching various bugs.
examples.chinese: 小学生经常会传染上各种各样的小毛病。

examples.english: If you don't clean the wound properly you could get an infection.
examples.chinese: 如果不彻底清洗伤口，伤口可能会感染。

examples.english: Roz was suffering from a throat infection and could hardly talk.
examples.chinese: 罗兹喉部感染，几乎无法讲话。

examples.english: People with your condition should not smoke.
examples.chinese: 患你这种病的人不应该吸烟。

examples.english: Diane suffers from a rare heart condition which means she has to take drugs all the time.
examples.chinese: 黛安娜患有一种罕见的心脏病，因此她必须一直服药。

examples.english: The medicine was supposed to cure all kinds of ailments, ranging from colds to back pains.
examples.chinese: 这种药被认为会治愈各种疾病，如感冒、背痛等等。

examples.english: The most commonly reported ailment among VDU operators is eye-strain.
examples.chinese: 视频显示器操作员中最常见的疾病是眼睛疲劳。

examples.english: Patients who often complain of minor ailments might have something more important on their minds.
examples.chinese: 经常述说患有各种小病痛的人可能在为某种更严重的病而担忧。

examples.english: Children with eating disorders such as anorexia need close supervision.
examples.chinese: 患有厌食症之类饮食失调的儿童需要严格指导。

examples.english: Minor stomach disorders are common when travelling abroad.
examples.chinese: 在国外旅行时，轻微的胃部不适是常有的事。

examples.english: Eventually after weeks of tests they discovered I had a rare liver disorder.
examples.chinese: 经过数周的检查之后，他们最终发现我患有一种罕见的肝脏疾病。

examples.english: The hospital specializes in treating disorders of the brain.
examples.chinese: 这家医院专门治疗脑疾。

examples.english: The cream is normally used for treating minor skin complaints.
examples.chinese: 这种药膏一般用来治疗轻微的皮肤病。

examples.english: Hay fever is a common complaint in spring and summer.
examples.chinese: 花粉热是春夏两季的常见病。

examples.english: Beth has an awful cold.
examples.chinese: 贝丝得了重感冒。

examples.english: I had all the usual childhood illnesses.
examples.chinese: 我得过所有常见的小儿疾病。

examples.english: Have you ever had pneumonia?
examples.chinese: 你患过肺炎吗？

examples.english: I think Jo's got flu.
examples.chinese: 我想乔是患了流行性感冒了。

examples.english: Dewey had been in hospital for several weeks suffering from malaria.
examples.chinese: 杜威患疟疾住院已好几个星期了。

examples.english: She suffers from asthma attacks.
examples.chinese: 她患有哮喘。

examples.english: There's something wrong with my chest - it feels really tight.
examples.chinese: 我胸口不适，感觉很闷。

examples.english: We thought there might be something wrong with her hearing.
examples.chinese: 我们觉得她的听觉可能有问题。

examples.english: ‘Where's Helen?’ ‘She's in bed with flu.’
examples.chinese: “海伦在哪里？”“她患了流感卧床在家。”

examples.english: The charity provides support for people with AIDS.
examples.chinese: 该慈善机构为患艾滋病的人提供支持帮助。

examples.english: He was admitted to hospital complaining of severe stomach pains.
examples.chinese: 他说肚子剧痛被送进医院。

examples.english: Many patients complain of headaches and difficulty sleeping when they take this drug.
examples.chinese: 许多服用了此药的病人诉说有头痛和睡眠困难。

examples.english: Figures released last week put the number of people infected with HIV at over 30,000.
examples.chinese: 上周公布的数字显示艾滋病病毒感染的人数超过了三万。

examples.english: Did you know when you first met him that he was infected with the disease?
examples.chinese: 你和他初相识时知道他感染了这种疾病吗？

centers.english: to start to have an illness

examples.english: I feel all hot - I think I'm getting flu.
examples.chinese: 我感到浑身发烫—我想是得流感了。

examples.english: Smoking increases the risk of getting cancer.
examples.chinese: 吸烟增加患癌症的危险。

examples.english: He thinks he got the cold from someone in the office.
examples.chinese: 他认为自己是被办公室里的某个人传染而感冒的。

examples.english: Luke has measles. I hope I don't catch it.
examples.chinese: 卢克得了麻疹，我希望我没传染上。

examples.english: I think I must have caught the flu from Sarah.
examples.chinese: 我想我肯定是从萨拉那里传染了流感。

expressions.text: come down with/ go down with something

examples.english: I'm afraid we can't come this weekend - the baby's gone down with a sore throat.
examples.chinese: 恐怕这个周末我们不能来了，宝宝喉咙痛。

examples.english: I picked up a stomach bug on holiday in Turkey.
examples.chinese: 我在土耳其度假时患了肚子痛。

examples.english: Brendan has a cold. He must have picked it up at school.
examples.chinese: 布伦丹得了感冒。他肯定是在学校里传染上的。

examples.english: After her family brought her home from hospital, she developed pneumonia.
examples.chinese: 家人把她从医院接回家后，她患上了肺炎。

examples.english: It is possible to develop diabetes in adulthood.
examples.chinese: 成年后有可能患糖尿病。

examples.english: a vaccine to prevent the development of influenza
examples.chinese: 一种预防流感的疫苗

examples.english: Orwell contracted tuberculosis during the war and eventually died from the disease.
examples.chinese: 奥韦尔在战时染上肺结核，后来死于该病。

examples.english: Dr Chalmers is trying to find out how many people may have contracted the disease in her area.
examples.chinese: 查默斯医生试图了解在她负责的地区有多少人可能染上该病。

examples.english: One of my students suddenly had an attack of asthma and I didn't know what to do.
examples.chinese: 我的一个学生哮喘突然发作，我不知该如何是好。

examples.english: Malaria often doesn't go away completely, and a patient may suffer from repeated attacks over several years.
examples.chinese: 疟疾经常好得不彻底，病人在几年间可能会反复发作。

examples.english: In recent months he had had several bouts of flu.
examples.chinese: 近几个月内他患了好几次流感。

examples.english: The patient may experience bouts of nausea as a result of the treatment.
examples.chinese: 病人可能会由于这种疗法而感到阵阵恶心。

examples.english: It's nothing serious -- just a touch of indigestion.
examples.chinese: 没什么大不了的一只不过是消化不良。

examples.english: I feel like I'm getting a touch of flu.
examples.chinese: 我觉得自己得了流感。

centers.english: when a lot of people have an illness

examples.english: Doctors are very concerned about an outbreak of tuberculosis in an East London School.
examples.chinese: 医生对伦敦东区一所学校爆发肺结核病很关注。

examples.english: AIDS has become an epidemic in some countries.
examples.chinese: 艾滋病在一些国家已成为流行病。

examples.english: Doctors warn that a flu epidemic may be on the way.
examples.chinese: 医生警告说可能爆发一场流感。

examples.english: The pain is getting worse.
examples.chinese: 疼痛越来越剧烈。

examples.english: You won't feel any pain during the operation.
examples.chinese: 手术过程中不会感到一丝疼痛。

examples.english: He told the doctor he was suffering from chest pains.
examples.chinese: 他告诉医生说胸口痛。

expressions.text: a pain in your chest/leg/back etc

examples.english: In college, Durban began to suffer from headaches and pain in his arms and legs
examples.chinese: 上大学时，杜尔班开始头痛以及四肢疼痛。

examples.english: A slipped disc can cause severe back pain.
examples.chinese: 椎间盘滑脱会引起背部剧痛。

examples.english: The drug is often used to ease the pain of dying cancer patients.
examples.chinese: 这种药经常用于缓解癌症患者临终前的疼痛。

examples.english: Kerry had to drive herself to the hospital when the labor pains began.
examples.chinese: 分娩的阵痛开始出现，克丽不得不自己开车去医院。

examples.english: The ache in my leg muscles had almost gone.
examples.chinese: 我腿部肌肉的疼痛差不多消失了。

examples.english: Lisa felt a dull ache spreading up her arm.
examples.chinese: 莉萨感到整条手臂隐隐作痛。

examples.english: I always get a headache when I've been using the computer.
examples.chinese: 我用电脑时总是会头痛。

examples.english: I'm not surprised you have stomach ache - you eat too fast.
examples.chinese: 你胃痛我并不奇怪—你吃得太快了。

expressions.text: have a toothache/a backache/a stomach ache

examples.english: I had a backache after fifteen minutes of shovelling snow.
examples.chinese: 铲了15分钟雪后我感到背痛。

examples.english: We were planning to go out last night, but Marcia had a splitting headache.
examples.chinese: 昨晚我们打算外出，但马西娅头痛欲裂。

examples.english: Grandma said that apart from a few aches and pains she was feeling quite well.
examples.chinese: 奶奶说，除了身上有几处疼痛之外，她感觉很好。

examples.english: Jenny ran slower and slower, complaining all the way of various aches and pains.
examples.chinese: 珍妮越跑越慢，一路上抱怨身上多处疼痛。

examples.english: He lay on the ground, breathless and frightened, waiting for the next spasm.
examples.chinese: 他躺在地上，呼吸急促，内心恐惧，不知道接着什么时候又会抽搐起来。

examples.english: A spasm of pain twisted Cheviot's face.
examples.chinese: 一阵抽痛使歇维尔的脸部扭曲了起来。

examples.english: The muscle spasms started in his lower left leg and spread upwards.
examples.chinese: 肌肉痉挛从他的左腿下方开始并向上蔓延。

examples.english: I'd had the odd twinge now and again, but my heart-attack was totally unexpected.
examples.chinese: 我有时感觉到一阵奇怪的刺痛，但从未料想会得心脏病。

examples.english: George felt a twinge of pain in his ankle from when he had slipped on the ice.
examples.chinese: 乔治在冰面上滑倒之后，就觉得脚踝有一阵刺痛感。

centers.english: when a part of your body feels painful

examples.english: Jim's knee was still painful where he had fallen on it.
examples.chinese: 吉姆摔倒时膝部着地的地方还在痛。

examples.english: The child suffered painful stomach cramps and vomiting after drinking one of the contaminated drinks.
examples.chinese: 那个孩子喝了被污染的饮料便腹绞痛，还吐了。

examples.english: His eyes looked red and sore, as if he had been rubbing them.
examples.chinese: 他的双眼看上去又红又痛，好像他一直在揉似的。

examples.english: Martin was unable to score at all in the game, complaining of a sore knee.
examples.chinese: 马丁说膝部痛，比赛中根本无法得分。

examples.english: She missed more than ten performances that year due to a persistent sore throat and cough.
examples.chinese: 由于一直嗓子痛和咳嗽，那年她错过了十多场演出。

examples.english: My mouth was tender and swollen where he had hit me.
examples.chinese: 我嘴上被他打过的地方一碰就痛，还肿了起来。

examples.english: Now I'm going to press down on several places around your knee, and you tell me when it feels tender.
examples.chinese: 现在我要按压你膝部周围的几处地方，哪里痛就告诉我。

examples.english: My neck felt stiff and my shoulder hurt.
examples.chinese: 我的脖子感到僵硬而且肩膀痛。

examples.english: I fell and banged my knee, and it really hurts.
examples.chinese: 我摔了一跤，撞伤了膝盖，痛得很。

examples.english: My arms ached from carrying all the groceries.
examples.chinese: 拿着那么多食品杂货，我的胳膊都痛了。

examples.english: She felt hot and her head was beginning to ache.
examples.chinese: 她感觉很热，头开始痛起来。

examples.english: I went to dance class last week, and I've been aching ever since.
examples.chinese: 上周我去上了舞蹈课，此后一直浑身疼痛。

examples.english: The smoke made our eyes sting.
examples.chinese: 烟雾使我两眼刺痛。

examples.english: His cheek stung where his mother had slapped him.
examples.chinese: 他脸上被母亲扇过耳光的地方火辣辣的疼。

examples.english: By late afternoon my head was throbbing, and I couldn't see straight.
examples.chinese: 到了下午晚些时候，我的头阵阵抽痛，而且看不清东西。

examples.english: He limped heavily, nursing his throbbing ankle.
examples.chinese: 他跛得厉害，阵阵抽痛的脚踝还没康复。

examples.english: I felt a throbbing pain in my left shin, and pulled up my trouser leg to see what was causing it.
examples.chinese: 我感到左胫部阵阵抽痛，于是撩起裤脚看看是怎么回事。

examples.english: She came into casualty complaining that she had a pain in her side.
examples.chinese: 她走进急诊室，说胁部疼痛。

examples.english: The next morning, after feeling a sharp pain in his fingers, Gonzalez was treated for frostbite at City Hospital.
examples.chinese: 第二天早上，冈萨雷斯觉得手指剧痛，便到市立医院去治疗冻伤。

examples.english: Young children cry if they are in pain, if they are hungry or if they are left alone.
examples.chinese: 年幼的儿童感到疼痛、饥饿或是孤独无伴时会哭。

examples.english: Someone was crying, as if they were in pain.
examples.chinese: 有人在哭，好像是处于痛苦之中。

examples.english: Some of these patients are very sick and in constant pain.
examples.chinese: 这些病人中有一些病得很厉害，一直受着疼痛的折磨。

expressions.text: be in a lot of pain/be in great pain

examples.english: Caroline's been in a lot of pain since the operation.
examples.chinese: 手术后，卡罗琳一直经受着剧痛。

examples.english: He was in agony. We had to carry him up the stairs.
examples.chinese: 他痛得很厉害。我们不得不把他抬到楼上。

examples.english: My mother lived for four more days, but she was in agony.
examples.chinese: 母亲多活了四天，但她承受了剧痛。

centers.english: when something makes someone feel pain

examples.english: Did it hurt when they stuck the needle in?
examples.chinese: 他们把针扎进去的时候痛吗？

examples.english: Stop it - you're hurting me.
examples.chinese: 住手—你弄痛我了。

examples.english: The antiseptic might sting a little.
examples.chinese: 这杀菌剂可能会引起一点刺痛感。

examples.english: The smoke stung my eyes.
examples.chinese: 烟雾刺痛了我的双眼。

examples.english: The pollen irritated my eyes, which were red and streaming with tears.
examples.chinese: 花粉使我的双眼发痛、发红，泪流不止。

examples.english: Nineteen percent of women will still use a beauty product, even if it irritates their skin.
examples.chinese: 百分之十九的女性使用一种化妆品后，即使皮肤刺痛还会继续使用。

examples.english: Stop using the cream immediately if it causes irritation.
examples.chinese: 如果引起皮肤刺痛，请立即停止使用该乳霜。

examples.english: The pain moved to my elbow, and it became agonizing to even lift my arm.
examples.chinese: 疼痛转移到了我的肘部，就连抬一下胳膊都痛得受不了。

examples.english: The excruciating pain in his kidneys made him gasp.
examples.chinese: 肾脏的剧痛使他直喘气。

examples.english: It was agony having my tooth removed - I don't think the dentist knew what he was doing.
examples.chinese: 拔牙痛极了—我觉得那个牙医不知道自己干了些什么。

examples.english: Climbing five flights of stairs with all those bags was absolute bloody agony.
examples.chinese: 拿着那么多行李走五段楼梯绝对是很痛苦的事。

examples.english: I twisted my ankle a little, but it doesn't hurt.
examples.chinese: 我扭了一下脚踝，但是不痛。

examples.english: Don't worry - it's a very quick procedure and it won't hurt.
examples.chinese: 别担心——疗程很快就完成，不痛的。

examples.english: The operation is simple and painless.
examples.chinese: 这种手术很简单，而且不痛。

examples.english: Don't worry about the injection - you won't feel a thing.
examples.chinese: 不要怕打针—一点都不痛的。

examples.english: The guys who were fighting were so drunk, I'm sure they didn't feel a thing.
examples.chinese: 打架的那些家伙醉得很厉害，我敢肯定他们感觉不到一点痛。

centers.english: hurt or injured in an accident, fight etc

examples.english: ‘Did you hear about that fire in the school?’ ‘Yes, thank God no one was hurt.’
examples.chinese: “你听说学校里的那场火灾了吗？”“听说了，感谢上帝没人受伤。”

examples.english: Four people have been injured in a road accident on the Arizona highway.
examples.chinese: 亚利桑那州高速公路上发生的一起交通事故中，有四人受伤。

examples.english: One man died, and another was seriously injured when a wall on a construction site collapsed.
examples.chinese: 一个建筑工地上有一面墙倒塌，造成一人死亡，另有一人受重伤。

examples.english: Fortunately, the driver of the van was not badly hurt.
examples.chinese: 所幸的是，小型货车的司机伤得不重。

examples.english: Six soldiers were slightly injured when a grenade exploded in a nearby truck.
examples.chinese: 附近一辆卡车上一个手榴弹爆炸，六名士兵受了轻伤。

examples.english: There were so many people at the match - it was lucky that no one got hurt.
examples.chinese: 有很多人观看比赛——真是幸运，没有人受伤。

examples.english: The motorbike rider, Gregory Watts, was fatally injured in the crash.
examples.chinese: 摩托车手格雷戈里·沃茨在这次撞车事故中受了致命伤。

examples.english: The man, in his early 30s, was wounded in the stomach after two gunmen opened fire.
examples.chinese: 两名持枪歹徒开枪，这名30出头的男子腹部中了弹。

examples.english: During the first five months of the war, 10, 000 people died and over 12,000 were seriously wounded.
examples.chinese: 战争的头五个月里，有一万人死亡，一万二千多人受重伤。

examples.english: We heard that my brother had been fatally wounded in the battle, and died two days later.
examples.chinese: 我们听说我哥哥在战场上受了致命伤，两天以后就死了。

centers.english: to hurt a part of your body

examples.english: Nick's hurt his back, and the doctor says he will have to rest for a few weeks.
examples.chinese: 尼克弄伤了背部，医生说他得休息几个星期。

examples.english: I can't go running this week - I've hurt my foot.
examples.chinese: 这个星期我不能去跑步了—我的脚弄伤了。

examples.english: That's a sharp knife. Be careful you don't hurt yourself.
examples.chinese: 这把刀很锋利，小心不要伤到自己。

examples.english: Tom injured his shoulder playing tennis.
examples.chinese: 汤姆打网球时伤了肩膀。

examples.english: Many elderly people injure themselves in their own homes, for example by slipping in the bath.
examples.chinese: 许多年长者都是在自己家里受伤的，比如在浴室里滑倒。

examples.english: Mom fell on the ice and bruised the side of her leg.
examples.chinese: 妈妈在冰上滑倒，碰伤了腿的一侧。

examples.english: Keller badly bruised a hip, and came off early in the second half of the match.
examples.chinese: 凯勒严重擦伤了屁股，比赛下半场很早就离场了。

examples.english: My skin bruises quite easily.
examples.chinese: 我的皮肤很容易擦伤。

examples.english: Some of his teeth were damaged and his jaw was badly bruised.
examples.chinese: 他有几颗牙齿摔坏了，下巴也擦伤得很厉害。

examples.english: I sprained my knee while I was playing basketball.
examples.chinese: 我打篮球时扭伤了膝盖。

examples.english: You'll need strong walking boots in the mountains, if you don't want to sprain an ankle.
examples.chinese: 在山里行走，如果不想扭伤脚踝的话，就需要一双结实的轻便靴。

examples.english: Stadler had to withdraw from the tournament, because of a sprained wrist.
examples.chinese: 斯塔德勒因为扭伤了手腕，只得退出锦标赛。

examples.english: It was such bad luck - it was our first time skiing and Nicola broke her leg.
examples.chinese: 运气真不好一我们第一次滑雪，妮古拉就摔断了腿。

examples.english: Chris escaped from the accident with no more than a broken arm.
examples.chinese: 事故中，克里斯死里逃生，只断了一条胳膊。

examples.english: I couldn't play, having twisted my knee in the previous night's game.
examples.chinese: 我在前一天晚上的比赛中扭伤了膝盖，不能参加比赛了。

examples.english: The doctor said that I'd wrenched my shoulder and shouldn't drive for a while.
examples.chinese: 医生说我扭伤了肩部，要有一阵子不能开车。

examples.english: Scott insisted on coming, despite his twisted ankle.
examples.chinese: 斯科特不顾脚踝扭伤，坚持要来。

examples.english: I pulled a muscle trying to move the piano into the apartment.
examples.chinese: 我想把钢琴搬进公寓里，结果拉伤了肌肉。

examples.english: Crawford had been ordered to take a day's rest after pulling a leg muscle.
examples.chinese: 克劳福德腿部一块肌肉拉伤了，被吩咐在家休息一天。

examples.english: Ted was having treatment for a pulled muscle.
examples.chinese: 特德拉伤了肌肉，正在接受治疗。

examples.english: Lewis damaged his knee in training and will not appear in the game.
examples.chinese: 刘易斯在训练中膝盖受伤，无法在比赛中出场。

examples.english: When carrying out the operation, doctors have to take great care not to damage the delicate nerve endings.
examples.chinese: 医生在进行手术时，必须非常小心，免得破坏脆弱的神经末梢。

examples.english: His damaged left foot will keep him off the field for the rest of the season.
examples.chinese: 他左腿上的伤使他在本赛季余下的时间里都不能上场。

examples.english: Sam dislocated his shoulder in a riding accident.
examples.chinese: 萨姆在一次骑马事故中肩部脱白了。

examples.english: The fall left her with several bruises and a dislocated shoulder.
examples.chinese: 这一跤摔得她身上好几处瘀青，肩膀也脱了臼。

examples.english: His head was bleeding, and he'd obviously been in a fight.
examples.chinese: 他头上流着血，显然跟人打过架了。

examples.english: John saw that he was bleeding from some sort of wound on his chest.
examples.chinese: 约翰看到他胸口在流血，好像受了什么伤。

examples.english: The cut on her leg had opened again and was bleeding heavily.
examples.chinese: 她腿上的伤口又开了，流出很多血。

examples.english: Let go of my arm! You're hurting me!
examples.chinese: 放开我的手！你弄痛我了。

examples.english: Dan was a good man. He'd never hurt anyone deliberately.
examples.chinese: 丹是个好人，他从不故意伤害别人。

examples.english: Put the stick down, Terry. You might hurt someone with it.
examples.chinese: 把棍子放下，特里，你会伤到人的。

examples.english: The bomb killed eleven people and injured 55.
examples.chinese: 炸弹炸死11人，炸伤55人。

examples.english: Several shots were fired, critically injuring three women.
examples.chinese: 有人开了好几枪，有三名女子严重受伤。

examples.english: Two boys were on trial for wounding a sixteen-year-old girl with a revolver.
examples.chinese: 两名男孩用左轮手枪打伤一名16岁的女孩，正在为此接受审讯。

expressions.text: wound somebody in the chest/knee etc

examples.english: The bullet wounded him in the shoulder.
examples.chinese: 那颗子弹打伤了他的肩膀。

examples.english: Inflicting pain as a means of teaching children discipline is wrong.
examples.chinese: 用体罚的办法来管教孩子是不对的。

examples.english: Most drugs can be produced quite successfully without inflicting pain on helpless animals.
examples.chinese: 大多数药物均可以在无需折磨无助的动物的情况下成功研制出来。

examples.english: The driver, who had been taking drugs, crippled the young woman for life.
examples.chinese: 那名吸了毒的司机使那位年轻女子终身残废。

examples.english: Richard was crippled in the bombing of 1984, and had been in a wheelchair ever since.
examples.chinese: 理查德在1984年的那次爆炸事件中受伤致残，从此就坐上了轮椅。

examples.english: He came home from Africa crippled, his career in the army over.
examples.chinese: 他从非洲归来，身体残废了，军旅生涯也结束了。

examples.english: Surely terrorists cannot believe that killing and maiming ordinary people is an achievement?
examples.chinese: 恐怖分子不会认为杀死和残害普通老百姓是一种成就吧？

examples.english: Of those who survived, most were sick, physically maimed, or mentally impaired.
examples.chinese: 活下来的那些人中，大都非病即残，或者是精神上受到损害。

centers.english: damage to a part of the body
centers.chinese: 身体某部位受到的损坏

examples.english: The glass roof collapsed onto the crowd, causing horrific injuries.
examples.chinese: 玻璃顶棚塌向人群，造成了可怕的伤害。

examples.english: Our insurance provides cover in the case of illness or injury.
examples.chinese: 我们这项保险承保疾病和受伤。

examples.english: Unfortunately, she had to withdraw from the game because of a leg injury.
examples.chinese: 不幸的是，她因为腿部受伤，只得退出比赛。

examples.english: Wearing a helmet may protect you from serious injury.
examples.chinese: 戴头盔可以防止你受重伤。

examples.english: He suffered serious injuries in the car crash, and died on the way to hospital.
examples.chinese: 他在车祸中受了重伤，送医院途中身亡。

examples.english: Ten passengers were lucky to escape injury when their train was derailed last night.
examples.chinese: 昨晚火车脱轨，十名乘客幸未受伤。

examples.english: Morrison had to undergo surgery on an injury to his left knee.
examples.chinese: 莫里森左膝受伤，只得接受手术。

examples.english: The wound was deep and needed eighteen stitches.
examples.chinese: 伤口很深，需要缝18针。

examples.english: Barratt was taken to the hospital with stab wounds to his chest and neck.
examples.chinese: 巴勒特胸口和颈部被捅伤，送到了医院治理。

examples.english: He died of a single gunshot wound to the left side of his head.
examples.chinese: 他头部左侧受了枪伤，一枪殒命。

examples.english: Jenny looked as though she'd been crying, and there was a nasty bruise on her cheek.
examples.chinese: 珍妮看上去像是哭过了，脸上还有一处严重的瘀伤。

expressions.text: be covered in cuts and bruises

examples.english: Jack often comes home from rugby covered in cuts and bruises.
examples.chinese: 杰克打完橄榄球回到家里，往往身上伤痕累累。

examples.english: It's a slight sprain - you should rest it for a few days.
examples.chinese: 这是轻微的扭伤，你应该休息几天。

examples.english: Robinson is suffering from an ankle sprain, and can't train this week.
examples.chinese: 罗宾逊扭伤了脚踝，这个星期不能训练。

examples.english: Never look straight at the sun. Any damage to the retina could cause permanent blindness.
examples.chinese: 千万不可直视太阳，视网膜若受损伤可导致永久性失明。

examples.english: Rubella is a serious infection, which can cause severe physical damage to the unborn child.
examples.chinese: 风疹是一种严重的感染，可对胎儿在生理上造成重大的损害。

examples.english: Firefighters had to cut off the roof of the car, so that the injured man could be lifted out.
examples.chinese: 消防队员只得割开车顶，以便抬出那名受伤男子。

examples.english: The injured were rushed to St Thomas's Hospital.
examples.chinese: 伤者被火速送往圣托马斯医院。

examples.english: a wounded soldier
examples.chinese: 一名受伤士兵

examples.english: There are over 4000 refugees in the camp, many of them wounded.
examples.chinese: 难民营里有四千多名难民，许多人都受了伤。

examples.english: Helicopters have been sent in to rescue the wounded from the war zone.
examples.chinese: 直升机已被派去营救战区的伤员。

examples.english: Mrs Burrows had been paralysed by a stroke, and could not move or speak.
examples.chinese: 伯罗斯夫人因中风瘫痪，不能行动，也不能说话。

examples.english: The fall had left him permanently paralysed.
examples.chinese: 这一跤跌得他终身瘫痪。

expressions.text: be paralysed from the neck/chest/waist down

examples.english: Paralysed from the neck down, Bundini could only move his eyes.
examples.chinese: 邦迪尼颈部以下瘫痪，只有眼睛能动。

examples.english: The bomb caused serious damage to the building, but there were no casualties.
examples.chinese: 炸弹爆炸给大楼造成了严重的破坏，但无人伤亡。

examples.english: Indian troops have suffered more than 1200 casualties.
examples.chinese: 印度军队的伤亡人数超过了1,200人。

examples.english: The driver of the car was unhurt, but his passenger was killed.
examples.chinese: 汽车司机安然无恙，但是他车上的乘客却不幸身亡。

examples.english: Six day trippers escaped unhurt when their hot air balloon hit power lines.
examples.chinese: 热气球撞到输电线，乘坐在上面的六名一日游游客安然脱身。

examples.english: The younger woman was suffering from shock but was otherwise unhurt.
examples.chinese: 那位较年轻的女子受了惊，但除此之外，身体并未受伤。

examples.english: The two youths, shaken but unhurt, declined to talk about the incident.
examples.chinese: 那两名青年受了惊吓但是没有受伤，他们拒绝谈论这一事件。

examples.english: The hostages were released unharmed some time afterwards.
examples.chinese: 过了一段时间之后，人质安然获释。

examples.english: All fourteen people who were working inside the building when the blaze started escaped unharmed.
examples.chinese: 起火时，正在大楼里上班的14人全部都安然逃生。

examples.english: All four people in the car were seriously hurt, but the truck driver walked away without a scratch.
examples.chinese: 汽车上的四人全部都受了重伤，但是卡车司机却平安脱身，毫发未损。

examples.english: Unlike Ed, Josh returned from the war in one piece.
examples.chinese: 不像埃德，乔希完好无损地从战场上回来了。

examples.english: I was extremely relieved when my son came back from the warzone all in one piece.
examples.chinese: 看到儿子从战区平安归来，我大大地放了心。

examples.english: I can hardly believe they were able to just walk away from the crash -- I thought they'd all been killed.
examples.chinese: 我几乎不敢相信他们居然能在这次撞车事故中安然脱身—我还以为他们都死了呢。

examples.english: The bullet grazed the side of his head, leaving him virtually unscathed.
examples.chinese: 子弹从他头部擦边而过，他几乎毫发未损。

examples.english: Most of the passengers escaped from the plane unscathed.
examples.chinese: 大部分乘客安然无恙地逃离了飞机。

expressions.text: come to no harm/not come to any harm

examples.english: If you keep quiet, you'll come to no harm.
examples.chinese: 如果你保持安静，就不会有事。

examples.english: I'm sure Craig's old enough to catch a train into town without coming to any harm.
examples.chinese: 我相信克雷格已经长大，可以自己乘火车进城而不会有事的。

examples.english: Fortunately, none of the hostages came to any serious harm.
examples.chinese: 所幸没有人质受到严重伤害。

examples.english: David goes to a special school for disabled children.
examples.chinese: 戴维去一所为残疾儿童开设的特殊学校上学。

examples.english: Her son is disabled and she has to take care of him all the time.
examples.chinese: 她儿子有残疾，她只好整天照料他。

examples.english: The governor has guaranteed health care for pregnant women, preschool children, and the disabled.
examples.chinese: 州长答应为孕妇、学龄前儿童以及伤残人士提供健康保健服务。

examples.english: She works with handicapped teenagers.
examples.chinese: 她帮助残疾少年。

examples.english: a school for mentally handicapped children
examples.chinese: 一所智障儿童学校

examples.english: a school for children with special needs
examples.chinese: 一所为有特殊需要的儿童开办的学校

examples.english: He's studying to teach children who have learning difficulties.
examples.chinese: 他在学习如何教育有学习障碍的儿童。

centers.english: a physical or mental problem that makes someone disabled
centers.chinese: 使某人残疾的身体或精神上的问题

examples.english: There are special courses for people with disabilities.
examples.chinese: 为残疾人士设有特殊课程。

examples.english: Because of his disability, he depended on his wife to dress him, feed him and bathe him.
examples.chinese: 他身患残疾，只得靠妻子帮助他穿衣吃饭洗澡。

examples.english: Studies say exposure to loud continuous noise can cause learning disabilities and behavioral problems in children.
examples.chinese: 研究显示，持续的吵闹噪音可以导致儿童发生学习障碍和行为问题。

examples.english: We help people with mental or physical handicaps to find work.
examples.chinese: 我们帮助智力或身体上有残疾的人找工作。

examples.english: Babies of alcoholic mothers can be born with a severe degree of handicap.
examples.chinese: 母亲酗酒，她们的婴儿可能一生下来就有严重的生理缺陷。

examples.english: Disabled students face different problems from their able-bodied friends.
examples.chinese: 残疾学生面对的问题与其体格健全的同学所面对的问题不同。

examples.english: Can you look after the kids for me this afternoon?
examples.chinese: 下午你帮我照看一下孩子好吗？

examples.english: I've told you, I can't come. There's no one to look after Frieda.
examples.chinese: 我告诉过你了，我不能来，没有人照顾弗里达。

examples.english: Jonathon has no idea what it means to take care of a baby all day long.
examples.chinese: 乔纳森根本不知道，整天看护一个婴儿意味着什么。

examples.english: We specialize in helping caregivers who take care of relatives in their own homes.
examples.chinese: 我们专门帮助在家照顾亲人的人。

examples.english: Elsie had to leave her job to care for her sick father.
examples.chinese: 埃尔茜只得辞去工作照顾生病的父亲。

examples.english: St Helen's Hospice, which cares for the terminally ill, is holding a special fund-raising week.
examples.chinese: 专门照顾晚期病人的圣海伦安养院正在举办一个特别募捐周。

examples.english: It is one of the only charities to care for Aids patients and ex-prisoners.
examples.chinese: 这是为艾滋病人和刑满释放者提供服务的少数几家慈善机构之一。

examples.english: The woman who minds Pip and Emma collects them from school and gives them an evening meal.
examples.chinese: 那个照看皮普和埃玛的女人把他们从学校接回家，然后给他们做晚饭。

examples.english: Mothers who work part-time are able to mind other people's children when they are not working.
examples.chinese: 兼职工作的母亲能够在不上班的时候照看别人的孩子。

examples.english: I'll ask Jane to babysit on Wednesday night.
examples.chinese: 我想请简星期三晚上来照看孩子。

examples.english: Ask Alex and Joan next time you're babysitting.
examples.chinese: 下次代他们看孩子时问问亚历克斯和琼。

examples.english: He used to babysit for Mary when she worked nights.
examples.chinese: 过去玛丽上夜班时，他就替她看孩子。

examples.english: Jenny sat for us last Friday evening when we went to the movies.
examples.chinese: 上星期五晚上我们去看电影时，珍妮替我们照看孩子。

examples.english: Benjy, I want you to stay in the yard where I can keep an eye on you.
examples.chinese: 本杰，我要你留在院子里，这样我能看着你。

examples.english: Would you mind keeping an eye on Stacey while I go for a cigarette?
examples.chinese: 我去抽根烟，请你帮我照看一下斯泰西，好吗？

expressions.text: keep a close/careful/watchful eye on somebody

examples.english: He warned parents to continue to keep a close eye on their children.
examples.chinese: 他告诫家长要继续看好孩子。

examples.english: Tony nursed his wife through her long illness without ever complaining.
examples.chinese: 托尼在其妻子久病期间一直照料着她，从无怨言。

examples.english: Irina had wanted to nurse him, but the doctors had sent her away.
examples.chinese: 艾琳娜想照料他，但是医生叫她走。

examples.english: The monks tended his wounds and nursed him back to health.
examples.chinese: 那些僧侣给他处理伤口，照料他恢复健康。

examples.english: Hospital staff can provide additional home support for carers.
examples.chinese: 医院员工可为照顾者提供家庭护理方面的额外帮助。

examples.english: We have a high number of volunteer carers at the day centre.
examples.chinese: 我们这个日间托儿所有许多志愿保育员。

examples.english: Like many caregivers, Marian gave up her job to provide 24-hour care for an elderly relative.
examples.chinese: 和许多家庭护理员一样，玛丽安放弃工作，为家里的一位老人提供24小时的看护。

centers.english: to look after a child until he or she has grown up

examples.english: She had brought him up as if he were her own son.
examples.chinese: 她把他当成自己的亲生儿子抚养成人。

examples.english: I don't need you to tell me how to bring up my son.
examples.chinese: 我不需要你来教我怎样教育儿子。

examples.english: For five years we were neighbors, and we raised our kids together.
examples.chinese: 我们做了五年的邻居，一起把孩子抚养长大。

expressions.text: be brought up (by somebody)/be raised (by somebody)

examples.english: His father died when he was seven, and he was brought up by his mother.
examples.chinese: 他7岁时父亲去世，由母亲抚养长大。

examples.english: I was born and raised in Alabama.
examples.chinese: 我生于亚拉巴马，长于亚拉巴马。

examples.english: I was brought up to trust people.
examples.chinese: 我从小被教育要信任别人。

examples.english: My parents brought me up to be truthful.
examples.chinese: 父母从小教育我要诚实。

examples.english: I was raised a Catholic, but I don't go to church anymore.
examples.chinese: 我从小就被培养成一名天主教徒，但是现在我已不再去做礼拜了。

examples.english: Grandpa raised a family of ten on seven dollars a week.
examples.chinese: 爷爷那时每周赚7美元抚养一家十口人。

examples.english: We should raise our daughters to be as confident as our menfolk.
examples.chinese: 我们应该把自己的女儿培养成像我们男人一样自信。

examples.english: I was a very well-brought up young lady.
examples.chinese: 我那时是一位很有教养的年轻女士。

examples.english: Your accent depends on where you live, your upbringing, that kind of thing.
examples.chinese: 你的口音受到你生活的地方、你的家庭教育等方面的因素影响。

examples.english: I had a strict religious upbringing.
examples.chinese: 我自小受到严格的宗教教育。

examples.english: Men, in general, are as good at child-rearing as women.
examples.chinese: 一般来说，男人养育孩子不比女人差。

examples.english: Have you discussed child-rearing methods with your future husband?
examples.chinese: 你与未来的丈夫讨论过养育子女的方法吗？

examples.english: The father has custody in only 10% of cases.
examples.chinese: 这些案例中，只有10%的父亲获得了对孩子的监护权。

examples.english: Fearing her uncle would gain custody of the child, she went into hiding.
examples.chinese: 她担心叔叔会取得那孩子的监护权，于是躲了起来。

examples.english: If you leave me, I'll get custody of the kids, because everyone knows you're sick.
examples.chinese: 如果你离开，我会得到孩子的监护权，因为大家都知道你有病。

examples.english: Waltman's wife had been granted temporary custody of their child after her husband's arrest.
examples.chinese: 沃尔特曼的妻子在丈夫被捕后，获得了对孩子的临时监护权。

examples.english: I loved my three girls, and losing custody was the most traumatic thing that has ever happened to me.
examples.chinese: 我爱我的三个女儿，失去监护权是我所经历的最痛苦的一件事。

examples.english: Tony insists he will seek joint custody of Joshua.
examples.chinese: 托尼坚持要争取对乔舒亚的共同监护权。

examples.english: The courts awarded residency to Trisha's father.
examples.chinese: 法院把监护权判给了特里沙的父亲。

examples.english: The parent who has residency often loses touch with the other partner's parents, meaning that the children lose one set of grandparents.
examples.chinese: 获得监护权的一方多数会和另一方的父母失去联系，这就意味着孩子失去了其中的两个祖父母。

centers.english: to look after a child who is not your own for a long time
centers.chinese: 长期照顾非亲生的孩子

examples.english: Chinese babies are the favorite choice of Americans adopting children from abroad.
examples.chinese: 中国的婴儿是美国人领养海外儿童的首选。

examples.english: She had hoped to get pregnant, but when she failed, she and her husband decided to adopt.
examples.chinese: 她希望自己能怀个孩子，但是希望落空以后，她和丈夫便决定去领养。

examples.english: He discovered that his guardian, Aunt Mimi, had not legally adopted him.
examples.chinese: 他发现自己的监护人美美姨妈并没有依法领养他。

examples.english: Teenagers who discover they were adopted often search for their biological parents when they are old enough.
examples.chinese: 有的十几岁的青少年在发现自己是领养的孩子之后，往往会在长大以后去寻找自己的亲生父母。

examples.english: Their two adopted daughters were the only Asians in the town.
examples.chinese: 他们的两个养女是镇上仅有的亚洲人。

examples.english: Fostering a teenager is obviously different from fostering a small child.
examples.chinese: 收养十几岁的孩子显然不同于收养一个幼童。

examples.english: During my mother's long illness I was fostered by a middle-aged couple on the other side of town.
examples.chinese: 在母亲长期患病期间，我被寄养在小镇另一边的一对中年夫妇家里。

examples.english: Half a million American children are in foster care at any given time.
examples.chinese: 在任何一个时候都有50万的美国儿童被寄养在别人家里。

examples.english: Steve went to live in a series of foster homes.
examples.chinese: 史蒂夫住过好几个寄养家庭。

examples.english: It is sometimes difficult to find suitable foster-parents for a lively ten-year-old.
examples.chinese: 有时候很难替一个好动的10岁孩子找到合适的养父母。

examples.english: He ran away after his foster-mother accused him of stealing.
examples.chinese: 养母说他偷东西，他就离家出走了。

examples.english: She added to her regular income by taking in foster-children.
examples.chinese: 她接受寄养的儿童，在固定收入之外增加一些收入。

examples.english: She finally adopted her foster-child, six-year old Shania.
examples.chinese: 她最后领养了人家寄养的孩子一六岁的沙妮娅。

examples.english: two New York subway cops who are also foster brothers
examples.chinese: 同时又是义兄弟的两名纽约地铁警察

examples.english: The court must obtain the consent of the child's parent or guardian.
examples.chinese: 法院必须征得孩子父母中的一方或监护人的同意。

examples.english: Children under 17 will only be admitted in the company of a parent or adult guardian.
examples.chinese: 17岁以下的儿童须由一名家长或成年监护人陪同才可入内。

examples.english: Could you contact Mrs Smith's guardians and tell them she's been admitted to hospital?
examples.chinese: 你能否联系上史密斯太太的监护人，告诉他们她已被送进医院？

examples.english: When Sara was 7, Aunt Maggie became her legal guardian.
examples.chinese: 萨拉7岁的时候，玛吉姨妈成了她的法定监护人。

examples.english: Many youngsters who've been brought up in care are often incapable of looking after themselves.
examples.chinese: 许多在收养所长大的青少年往往都没有自理能力。

examples.english: The number of children in care in Oxfordshire is falling.
examples.chinese: 牛津郡受监护儿童的数量正在下降。

centers.english: someone who is paid to look after children

examples.english: I'll come with you if I can get a babysitter for Friday.
examples.chinese: 星期五我要是找到人看孩子的话，就和你一起去。

examples.english: I guess we should have some snacks around for the sitter.
examples.chinese: 我想我们应该给临时保姆预备些零食。

examples.english: Sheila's setting up in business as a registered childminder on a special list of childminders that have been approved by the authorities.
examples.chinese: 希拉以注册保育员的身份做起了生意。

examples.english: I asked my childminder to do what I do when Laura is naughty.
examples.chinese: 我要求给我看小孩的人在劳拉淘气的时候也像我那样去做。

examples.english: He turned and flung himself into his nanny's arms.
examples.chinese: 他转身投入保姆的怀抱。

examples.english: I can't afford a nanny.
examples.chinese: 我请不起保姆照看孩子。

examples.english: Working as an au pair, I spend most of my time with young children, so I dress casually.
examples.chinese: 我是做换工的，大部分时间和小孩子在一起，所以穿得很随便。

examples.english: Don't worry, the au pair will clean it up.
examples.chinese: 别担心，换工会来打扫的。

examples.english: Even women in well-paid jobs, who can afford childcare, are faced with managing the home and a career.
examples.chinese: 即使是拿高薪、付得起托管费的妇女，也要面临家庭和事业两头兼顾的困难。

examples.english: After-school childcare is an area of particular importance to many working mothers.
examples.chinese: 儿童课外托管对于许多上班的妈妈来说尤为重要。

examples.english: How much does it cost an employer to provide daycare facilities?
examples.chinese: 一个雇主为员工提供日托设施需要花多少钱？

examples.english: She works in a daycare center.
examples.chinese: 她在一家日托中心工作。

examples.english: Jordan's been in daycare since he was six months old.
examples.chinese: 乔丹自六个月大就放在日托中心了。

centers.english: to look after someone by helping them

examples.english: We had a lovely time in Dorset. Susan looked after us very nicely. She's a wonderful cook.
examples.chinese: 我们在多塞特度过了一段美好的时光。苏珊把我们照顾得很好，她的菜做得好极了。

examples.english: Paul's old enough to look after himself.
examples.chinese: 保罗已经长大，能照顾自己了。

examples.english: Don't worry about me. I can take care of myself.
examples.chinese: 别担心我，我能照顾自己。

examples.english: Alex could see the horse had been well looked after.
examples.chinese: 亚历克斯看得出，这匹马被照顾得很好。

examples.english: Don't look so worried -- she's being well looked after by the nurses.
examples.chinese: 别这么担心——护士把她照顾得很好。

examples.english: Take good care of yourself while you're away.
examples.chinese: 你外出的时候要好好照顾自己。

examples.english: They took very good care of me.
examples.chinese: 他们把我照顾得很好。

examples.english: The firm is getting a reputation for taking better care of its customers than in the past.
examples.chinese: 该公司名声渐长，比以前更能满足客户的需求了。

examples.english: Dr Gresham is busy at the moment attending to one of his patients.
examples.chinese: 格雷沙姆医生现在正忙着照顾一位病人。

examples.english: The cabin crew will attend to the passengers’ needs.
examples.chinese: 客舱服务员会照料乘客的需要。

examples.english: They worked happily together, feeding and attending to the livestock.
examples.chinese: 他们喂养和照料牲口，一起工作得很开心。

examples.english: Adrienne, eleven years older, had taken the 19-year-old singer under her wing.
examples.chinese: 年长11岁的阿德里安娜承担起了照顾这名19岁歌手的责任。

examples.english: He had sized me up, he said, and had decided to take me under his wing.
examples.chinese: 他说他估量过我了，决定照顾我。

centers.english: to not look after someone properly

examples.english: He was neglected by his parents when he was very young.
examples.chinese: 他很小的时候被父母忽视。

examples.english: Staff at the hostel were accused of neglecting and abusing children in their care.
examples.chinese: 收容所里的工作人员被指责忽视并虐待他们看管的孩子。

examples.english: Some teachers devote too much time to helping their slower students and neglect the brighter ones.
examples.chinese: 有些教师在迟钝的学生身上花了太多时间，忽视了聪明的学生。

examples.english: increases in homelessness, child abuse and neglect
examples.chinese: 无家可归的现象、虐待和忽视儿童的现象的增加

examples.english: He alleges that the orphanages have allowed children to die from medical neglect.
examples.chinese: 他指控孤儿院不让儿童就医，任由他们生病死亡。

examples.english: You can have a new bike for Christmas if you promise to look after it.
examples.chinese: 如果你答应用心爱护的话，圣诞节可以送你一辆新的自行车。

examples.english: You could see someone had been looking after the garden, even though the house had been empty for years.
examples.chinese: 虽然这房子已经空置多年，但是看得出有人在照料这个花园。

examples.english: The miniature railway is looked after by local volunteers.
examples.chinese: 这微型铁路由当地的义工负责看管。

examples.english: You don't mind looking after the place for me while I'm away, do you?
examples.chinese: 我不在的时候，你帮我照看一下这地方，好吗？

examples.english: Tom went into the library while I kept an eye on the bikes.
examples.chinese: 汤姆进图书馆了，我则看管自行车。

examples.english: Does a neighbor keep an eye on your house while you are away?
examples.chinese: 你不在的时候有邻居帮你看房子吗？

examples.english: Can you keep an eye on my bags while I go to the toilet?
examples.chinese: 我去一下洗手间，你帮我看一下手提包好吗？

examples.english: Residents work in the downstairs shop, and also help to maintain the building.
examples.chinese: 居民在楼下的商店上班，同时还负责大楼的维护。

examples.english: His role is to maintain the society's fleet of vans, ready to respond in any emergency.
examples.chinese: 他的工作是保养协会的车队，随时应付紧急情况。

examples.english: An attempt was being made to maintain the grounds, but weeds were starting to grow in the driveway.
examples.chinese: 庭园正在做养护工作，但是车道上也开始长杂草了。

examples.english: A car is quite a big expense, especially when you consider maintenance.
examples.chinese: 汽车是一笔很大的开销，尤其是考虑到保养的时候。

examples.english: Because there had been no maintenance, the college buildings were in a poor state.
examples.chinese: 学校里的建筑因为年久失修，已很破败了。

examples.english: the maintenance of public roads
examples.chinese: 公共道路的养护

examples.english: Most gas appliances require routine maintenance once a year to ensure safety.
examples.chinese: 多数煤气用具需要一年一次的定期保养，以确保安全。

examples.english: The city is paying $30,000 in annual maintenance costs.
examples.chinese: 该市每年要支付30,000美元的维修费。

examples.english: She has become a leading expert on the care and maintenance of Renaissance paintings.
examples.chinese: 在护理和保养文艺复兴时期的绘画作品方面，她已成为最优秀的专家。

examples.english: Care of the environment has become a priority in government thinking.
examples.chinese: 保护环境已成了政府所考虑的头等大事。

examples.english: These photocopiers require a little extra care to keep them running right.
examples.chinese: 这些复印机再稍微保养一下就可以正常使用。

examples.english: hair-care products
examples.chinese: 护发产品

examples.english: I'd advise you to follow a new skin care routine.
examples.chinese: 我建议你用一种新的护肤方法。

examples.english: The trustees are responsible for the upkeep of the bridge.
examples.chinese: 受托人负责大桥的养护。

examples.english: The Council's contribution towards the upkeep of the church is very much appreciated.
examples.chinese: 非常感谢市议会对于教堂的保养所作的贡献。

examples.english: You get more for your money if you buy an old house, but upkeep costs will be higher
examples.chinese: 买旧房子合算一些，但是维修费要高一些。

examples.english: It is possible that in the near future we will be able to cure AIDS.
examples.chinese: 在不久的将来我们有可能能够治愈艾滋病。

examples.english: Many cancer victims can be cured if the disease is detected early enough.
examples.chinese: 如果癌症被及早诊断出来，许多患者都是可以治好的。

examples.english: Eventually we found a doctor who was able to cure her of her depression.
examples.chinese: 我们终于找到了一个能治愈她抑郁症的医生。

examples.english: Breast cancer is curable when caught in the early stages.
examples.chinese: 早期发现的话乳腺癌可以治愈。

examples.english: Take this -- it'll make you feel a lot better.
examples.chinese: 吃了这药—你会感觉好多了的。

examples.english: I've had all kinds of medicines from the chemist, but nothing seems to make me any better.
examples.chinese: 药剂师给我配了各种各样的药，我都吃了，可病情似乎一点也没有好转。

examples.english: She refuses to take anything to make her headache better.
examples.chinese: 她拒绝服用任何药物来减轻她的头痛。

examples.english: This cream is good for healing minor cuts and bruises.
examples.chinese: 这种药膏用来治轻微的刀伤和瘀肿效果很好。

examples.english: Madame Bernice claimed to be able to heal people simply by laying her hands on their bodies.
examples.chinese: 伯尼斯夫人称，只要将自己的双手放到病人身上就能治好他们的病。

examples.english: I can give you some tablets that will ease the symptoms, but they're not a cure.
examples.chinese: 我可以给你一些减轻症状的药片，但不能治本。

examples.english: What's the best cure for a hangover?
examples.chinese: 用什么办法来解宿醉最好？

examples.english: As yet there's no known cure for the disease.
examples.chinese: 目前还未找到治疗这种疾病的方法。

examples.english: I tried some herbal remedies such as drinking camomile tea, but none of them worked.
examples.chinese: 我试了一些草药方子如甘菊茶等，可都没效果。

examples.english: Salt water is a good home remedy for a sore throat.
examples.chinese: 喝盐水是治喉咙疼痛有效的家庭疗法。

examples.english: Unless an antidote is given immediately the patient could die.
examples.chinese: 除非马上服用解毒药，否则病人会死的。

examples.english: There is no known antidote to a bite from this snake.
examples.chinese: 被这种蛇咬中毒没有已知的解药。

centers.english: when a disease cannot be cured

examples.english: My doctor told me that the cancer was incurable.
examples.chinese: 医生告诉我这种癌症是不治之症。

examples.english: Patients with incurable illnesses are brought to the hospice, where they are given the best possible care.
examples.chinese: 绝症病人被送往安养院，在那里接受尽可能好的照顾。

examples.english: He suffers from chronic asthma.
examples.chinese: 他患有慢性哮喘。

examples.english: Two years ago, his mother developed terminal cancer.
examples.chinese: 两年前，他的母亲患上了晚期癌症。

examples.english: St Helen's Hospice cares for people with terminal illnesses.
examples.chinese: 圣海伦安养院照料绝症病人。

examples.english: Many of the patients are in the terminal stages of the disease.
examples.chinese: 许多病人都处于该病的晚期。

examples.english: Her father is terminally ill.
examples.chinese: 她父亲患了不治之症。

centers.english: to become healthy again after an illness or accident
centers.chinese: 生病或发生意外后恢复健康

examples.english: My mother's been very ill, and is still in hospital recovering.
examples.chinese: 我妈妈病得很重，仍在医院，正在康复之中。

examples.english: Sammy needed to recover a little before they could move him to a hospital nearer his home.
examples.chinese: 萨米需要稍稍康复才可以被转到离他家更近的医院。

examples.english: He never really recovered from the operation.
examples.chinese: 手术后他一直没有彻底康复。

examples.english: It was several months before John had fully recovered from his heart attack.
examples.chinese: 约翰的心脏病发作，好几个月以后才完全康复。

examples.english: The doctors were surprised at Phillip's quick recovery.
examples.chinese: 医生对菲利普的迅速康复感到惊讶。

examples.english: I hope you get better soon.
examples.chinese: 希望你早日康复。

examples.english: My back has been quite bad recently, but it's getting better slowly.
examples.chinese: 近来我的背感觉很不舒服，不过在慢慢好起来了。

examples.english: I didn't remember anything about the accident, but little by little, as I got better, memories started coming back to me.
examples.chinese: 那场事故我一点也想不起来，不过随着伤势的好转，我一点一点地恢复了记忆。

examples.english: The disease has been caught early, and the doctors say she should make a complete recovery.
examples.chinese: 疾病被发现得早，医生说她应该能够完全恢复。

examples.english: Thomas is making a good recovery, although he is still quite weak.
examples.chinese: 托马斯虽然仍很虚弱，但他恢复得很好。

examples.english: Joe has made a remarkable recovery from the injuries he sustained in the accident.
examples.chinese: 乔在事故中受伤后恢复显著。

examples.english: Mark hasn't got over the flu yet. He still feels pretty weak.
examples.chinese: 马克还没有从流感中康复过来，他还是很虚弱。

examples.english: I've had a nasty cold, but I'm getting over it now.
examples.chinese: 我患了严重感冒，不过现在正在康复。

examples.english: The doctor told Mum it was only a stomach upset, not food poisoning, and she would get over it in a day or two.
examples.chinese: 医生告诉妈妈这只是肠胃不适，不是食物中毒，一两天以后就会好的。

examples.english: Get well soon -- we all miss you!
examples.chinese: 快点康复—我们大家都想你！

examples.english: I hope you get well quickly.
examples.chinese: 希望你很快康复。

examples.english: I hope you feel better soon.
examples.chinese: 希望你早日康复。

examples.english: My father's been quite ill, but he's starting to feel a bit better now.
examples.chinese: 我父亲病得很厉害，不过现在他开始好一些了。

examples.english: Susie's improving gradually with this new treatment.
examples.chinese: 苏茜接受这种新疗法后在渐渐康复。

examples.english: My health finally began to improve when I changed to a less stressful job.
examples.chinese: 我换了一个比较轻松的工作以后，健康状况终于开始好转了。

examples.english: She was told to go back to the doctor in two weeks if she hadn't improved.
examples.chinese: 她被告知如果两周内没有好转，就要再去看医生。

examples.english: I'm afraid there have been no signs of improvement yet; she is still extremely ill.
examples.chinese: 恐怕尚无好转迹象；她仍病得非常严重。

examples.english: There's been a big improvement in his health over the last three months.
examples.chinese: 过去三个月来他的健康明显好转。

examples.english: I'm glad to see you're on the mend again.
examples.chinese: 我很高兴看到你病情又好转了。

examples.english: Kathy's been quite ill with flu, but I think she's on the mend now.
examples.chinese: 凯茜得了流感，病得很重，不过我觉得她现在正在好转。

examples.english: Towards the end of the year he caught flu, and he couldn't shake it off.
examples.chinese: 快到年底时他得了流感，怎么也好不起来。

examples.english: It seems to be taking me a long time to shake off this cold.
examples.chinese: 看来我要过一段长时间感冒才会好。

centers.english: to spend time resting in order to recover

examples.english: It was a very difficult birth, and Mary is now recuperating at home with the baby.
examples.chinese: 分娩过程很艰难，玛丽现在带着宝宝在家休养。

examples.english: She's going to need time to recuperate after the operation.
examples.chinese: 手术后她需要时间康复。

examples.english: We decided to take Dad on holiday to help his recuperation.
examples.chinese: 我们决定带爸爸去度假，帮助他康复。

examples.english: I think you're going to need quite a long period of recuperation.
examples.chinese: 我觉得你的康复期会相当长。

examples.english: They travelled to Bermuda for six weeks so that David could convalesce in the sun.
examples.chinese: 他们到百慕大去旅游了六个星期，这样戴维可以在阳光下慢慢康复。

examples.english: Jason is now convalescing at home after a major operation.
examples.chinese: 贾森经过了一次大手术，现在在家休养。

examples.english: They suggested that I spend a period of convalescence in the mountains.
examples.chinese: 他们提议我到山里去疗养。

examples.english: During the second week of her convalescence Wanda felt that she was beginning to recover.
examples.chinese: 在休养期的第二周，万达感觉自己在开始恢复。

centers.english: to be better again after an illness or injury
centers.chinese: 病后或受伤后恢复健康

examples.english: How are you? Are you better?
examples.chinese: 你怎么样了？好些了吗?

examples.english: I'll just rest today, and, hopefully, I'll be better tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我今天只需休息一下，可能明天就好了。

examples.english: I hope Robert's better by Saturday, because we need him for the team.
examples.chinese: 我希望罗伯特到星期六就康复了，因为我们队里需要他。

examples.english: As soon as you're well we'll go to Florida and have a few weeks in the sun.
examples.chinese: 你身体一好了，我们就去佛罗里达，在阳光下度过几周。

examples.english: They couldn't really make any firm plans until Luis was well again.
examples.chinese: 在路易斯康复之前，他们无法安排出确定的计划。

examples.english: We were relieved to find that Barnes was fully recovered and able to take part in the race.
examples.chinese: 看到巴恩斯完全恢复而且能参加比赛，我们都感到宽慰。

examples.english: Keep the patient still and quiet until he is fully recovered from the attack.
examples.chinese: 让病人保持平静，直至他完全从这次袭击中恢复过来。

examples.english: She's still rather weak, but her bronchitis seems to be cured.
examples.chinese: 她仍相当虚弱，但她的支气管炎似乎已痊愈了。

examples.english: It is only after two or three years that the doctors can say you are definitely cured of cancer.
examples.chinese: 要到两三年后，医生才能说你的癌症已肯定被治好了。

examples.english: He was always confident that he would be completely cured.
examples.chinese: 他总是很有信心，认为自己能彻底痊愈。

examples.english: You've had a bad attack of malaria, but I think you're over it now.
examples.chinese: 你得了严重的疟疾，不过我想现在你已经好了。

examples.english: Her temperature is going down again - she seems to be over the worst.
examples.chinese: 她的体温又降下去了，看来她已过了最严重的阶段。

examples.english: After a day or two in bed I'll be back on my feet again.
examples.chinese: 在床上躺一两天我又能恢复如初了。

examples.english: Wait till you're back on your feet before you start worrying about your exams.
examples.chinese: 等你恢复健康后再担心考试的事吧。

examples.english: She's up and about now, and should be back at work in a day or two.
examples.chinese: 她已经能起床走动，一两天后应该能上班了。

examples.english: It's good to see you up and about again.
examples.chinese: 见到你可以起床走动真好。

examples.english: Don't come back to work until you're completely fit.
examples.chinese: 等你完全康复再回来上班。

examples.english: He should be back at training next week if he's fit.
examples.chinese: 如果他康复的话，下周应该可以回来接受训练了。

examples.english: Don't worry - I'll be as fit as a fiddle again by next week.
examples.chinese: 别担心，到下周我就会完全康复。

centers.english: to become strong or happy again after a period of problems or unhappiness
centers.chinese: 遇到问题或不开心的一段时间后又变得坚强或愉快

examples.english: Losing my job was a terrible blow, and it took me quite a while to recover.
examples.chinese: 失去工作对我是可怕的打击，我费了相当长的一段时间才恢复过来。

examples.english: Mark never really recovered from the shock of his father's death.
examples.chinese: 马克始终未能彻底从父亲去世的打击中恢复过来。

examples.english: It took a long time for the British economy to recover from the effects of the war.
examples.chinese: 英国经济过了很长一段时期才从战争的影响中恢复过来。

examples.english: American aid played a major part in the country's economic recovery.
examples.chinese: 美国的援助对该国的经济复苏起了重大作用。

examples.english: It took Joe quite a long time to get over the divorce.
examples.chinese: 乔好长一段时间才从离婚的打击中恢复过来。

examples.english: Don't worry about Henry - he'll soon get over it.
examples.chinese: 别为亨利担心，他很快就会恢复的。

examples.english: Children seem to get over things very quickly.
examples.chinese: 儿童似乎很快就能从不快中恢复过来。

examples.english: Liverpool's footballers hope to bounce back after their defeat in Europe last week.
examples.chinese: 利物浦队的足球运动员希望能从上周在欧洲失利的阴影中迅速恢复状态。

examples.english: We are confident the business will bounce back from the recession.
examples.chinese: 我们有信心公司会从经济衰退中迅速恢复。

centers.english: to be strong or happy again after a period of problems or unhappiness
centers.chinese: 经过一段时期的问题或不开心之后又变得坚强或愉快

examples.english: Experts believe that Colombia is now over the worst of its troubles.
examples.chinese: 专家相信哥伦比亚现已克服了最麻烦的问题。

examples.english: Sharon seems to be over her reading difficulties now.
examples.chinese: 莎伦现在好像已经克服了阅读困难。

examples.english: It took Greg a long time to cope with his parents’ divorce, but I think he's over it now.
examples.chinese: 格雷格费了很长时间应付父母离婚对他的影响，但我觉得他已恢复过来了。

examples.english: It's good to see that Mandy's herself again.
examples.chinese: 见到曼迪情绪平复了，真让人宽慰。

examples.english: It wasn't until six months after my husband's death that I started to feel myself again.
examples.chinese: 丈夫去世六个月后我才开始恢复情绪。

examples.english: I think Judith was quite badly affected by shock, but she seems to be back to normal now.
examples.chinese: 我觉得朱迪丝受惊吓后情绪大受影响，但她现在好像已经恢复正常了。

centers.english: treatment for an injury or illness

examples.english: Doctors are trying out a new treatment for depression.
examples.chinese: 医生在试验一种抑郁症的新疗法。

examples.english: Natural poisons such as snake venom are now being used in the treatment of human nervous disorders.
examples.chinese: 蛇毒等天然毒物现在被用于治疗人类的神经疾病。

examples.english: He's receiving treatment for cancer.
examples.chinese: 他在接受癌症治疗。

examples.english: They received medical treatment at the hospital after the assault.
examples.chinese: 他们遭到袭击后在医院接受了治疗。

examples.english: a course of treatment which should lead to an improvement in the patient's condition
examples.chinese: 可以改善病人状况的一个疗程

examples.english: The therapy involves getting the patient to tell the doctor about their early childhood.
examples.chinese: 这一疗法需要让患者把自己童年的经历对医生讲出来。

examples.english: This child is clearly very disturbed emotionally and may require long-term therapy.
examples.chinese: 这孩子显然有严重的情绪失常，可能需要长期治疗。

examples.english: He's been in therapy for years, but he's still got a big self-esteem problem.
examples.chinese: 他接受治疗已有多年，但他在自尊心方面仍存在严重的问题。

examples.english: Will she need to have speech therapy?
examples.chinese: 她需要接受言语治疗吗？

examples.english: Don underwent months of physical therapy after the accident.
examples.chinese: 事故发生后，唐接受了长达几个月的物理治疗。

examples.english: Jane is studying medicine.
examples.chinese: 简在学医。

examples.english: The discovery of penicillin revolutionized Western medicine.
examples.chinese: 青霉素的发现使西方医学起了革命性的变化。

examples.english: So why is complementary medicine gaining popularity?
examples.chinese: 那么非传统疗法为什么会越来越受欢迎呢？

examples.english: Many of these people have been failed by conventional medicine or have rejected it.
examples.chinese: 这些人当中有许多是传统疗法治不好或者是拒绝传统疗法的。

examples.english: The doctor says I must have an operation.
examples.chinese: 医生说我必须动手术。

examples.english: I had an operation on my knee last year.
examples.chinese: 去年我的膝部动了手术。

examples.english: Ask the surgeon how many times he has performed the operation before, and with what success.
examples.chinese: 问问那位外科医生这种手术他做过多少次，成功率是多少。

examples.english: She needed emergency surgery after the accident.
examples.chinese: 事故发生后，她需要做急救手术。

examples.english: He's currently recovering from surgery on his right knee.
examples.chinese: 他的右膝动过手术，目前正在恢复。

examples.english: Last year, she underwent surgery for breast cancer.
examples.chinese: 她去年因乳腺癌开了刀。

examples.english: Before undergoing surgery, patients should discuss the various options with their doctor.
examples.chinese: 动手术前病人应该与医生讨论一下各种选择方案。

examples.english: an injury requiring major surgery
examples.chinese: 需要动大手术的伤

examples.english: patients on the waiting list for heart surgery
examples.chinese: 等着做心脏手术的病人

examples.english: I hate having injections.
examples.chinese: 我讨厌打针。

examples.english: Mrs. Wilson, I'm going to give you an injection to help you relax.
examples.chinese: 威尔逊太太，我要给你打一针来帮助你放松。

examples.english: a typhoid jab
examples.chinese: 一针伤寒注射剂

examples.english: The kids have to get their shots before they go to school.
examples.chinese: 孩子们得打过针后才能去上学。

examples.english: Doctors are treating him for cancer.
examples.chinese: 医生正给他治疗癌症。

examples.english: Many common infections can be treated with antibiotics.
examples.chinese: 许多普通的感染都可以用抗生素治愈。

examples.english: The doctor says they'll have to operate straightaway, before the cancer spreads.
examples.chinese: 医生说要在癌症扩散前马上开刀。

examples.english: It can be risky to operate on very old people.
examples.chinese: 对老年人动手术可能风险很大。

examples.english: They had to operate on my arm because it was broken in two places.
examples.chinese: 我的手臂有两处骨折，因此他们只得动手术。

examples.english: Judith never pays attention in class.
examples.chinese: 朱迪思上课从来都不专心。

examples.english: The TV was on, but Jamal wasn't really paying attention to it.
examples.chinese: 电视机开着，但是贾马尔其实并没有专心在看。

examples.english: I often find myself nodding and smiling at my children without really paying them much attention.
examples.chinese: 我经常发现自己虽然朝着孩子们点头微笑，但其实心思并不在他们身上。

examples.english: Lawyers around the country were paying close attention to the trial.
examples.chinese: 全国各地的律师都密切关注这个案子的审理。

examples.english: I tried to read a few pages, but I found it hard to concentrate.
examples.chinese: 我想看几页书，但很难集中注意力。

examples.english: There were so many people talking that I couldn't concentrate on the music.
examples.chinese: 那么多人在说话，我的注意力怎么也集中不到音乐上来。

examples.english: Sherman sat hunched forward and staring through the windshield, trying to concentrate on the traffic.
examples.chinese: 舍曼弓着背坐着，眼睛通过挡风玻璃盯着前方，专心地注意着行驶的车辆。

examples.english: His face was solemn with concentration.
examples.chinese: 他神情专注，一脸严肃。

examples.english: Plummer said she plans to continue her concentration on the 3,000 meter race.
examples.chinese: 普卢默说，她打算继续专攻3,000米的长跑比赛。

examples.english: Just keep your mind on the driving -- I'll figure out where we are.
examples.chinese: 你就专心开车吧—我来搞清楚我们在哪里。

examples.english: Bill couldn't keep his mind on anything but the verdict.
examples.chinese: 比尔一心只想着法院的判决。

examples.english: We had to keep our eyes on the sandy path to avoid the roots and rocks in the way.
examples.chinese: 我们只得很小心地看着沙石路走，免得踩到路上的根茎和石块。

examples.english: Keep your eyes on the ball -- now swing!
examples.chinese: 小心看球一现在打过去吧！

examples.english: There is a lot of criticism of the new law and a number of politicians are beginning to take notice.
examples.chinese: 这项新制定的法律招致了许多批评，一些政治家已经开始注意到了。

examples.english: No one took notice of me until I pulled out my notebook and started writing.
examples.chinese: 没有人注意到我，直到我拿出笔记本开始写起来。

examples.english: The organization began to take note of its public image.
examples.chinese: 这个组织开始注意起它的公众形象了。

examples.english: As usual, Greenspan's announcement made the financial world sit up and take notice.
examples.chinese: 一如以往，格林斯潘发布的公告引起了金融界的注意。

examples.english: Hecke's new work has something of interest for both the casual and attentive viewer.
examples.chinese: 赫克的新作雅俗共赏。

examples.english: The crew were extremely attentive to the passengers’ safety.
examples.chinese: 机组人员极为关心乘客的安全。

examples.english: Kids of his age typically have a very short attention span.
examples.chinese: 这个年龄的孩子，注意力集中的时间一般都很短。

centers.english: to pay particular attention to a subject or person
centers.chinese: 特别注意某话题或某个人

examples.english: The government never pays any attention to pre-school education.
examples.chinese: 政府从来不关心学前教育。

examples.english: The investigators at the crash site are paying particular attention to the weather data.
examples.chinese: 撞车事故现场的调查人员特别注意天气资料。

examples.english: Previously the company payed much more attention to its investors than it did to its customers.
examples.chinese: 之前，公司关心投资者大大超过了关心它的客户。

expressions.text: not pay enough attention to something

examples.english: Not enough attention is paid to the role of diet in illnesses such as cancer and heart disease.
examples.chinese: 人们对饮食在癌症、心脏病等疾病上所起的作用不够关注。

examples.english: Concentrate on the content of your report. You can worry about its format or appearance when you've finished writing.
examples.chinese: 要注重报告的内容，格式或版面可以留待写好了之后再去操心。

examples.english: The conference will focus on the issue of population control.
examples.chinese: 会议将主要讨论人口控制问题。

examples.english: Amelia next turned her attention to finding herself a place to live.
examples.chinese: 阿梅莉娅接着就开始专心找住的地方。

examples.english: Having dealt with the problem of energy sources, let's now turn our attention to the question of nuclear power.
examples.chinese: 讲完了能源问题，我们现在来谈谈核动力问题。

examples.english: I worry about how Quincy's going to do in school - he can't sit still long enough to give anything his undivided attention.
examples.chinese: 我担心昆西在学校里怎么办—他坐不住，什么事情都专心不了。

expressions.text: give your undivided attention to something

examples.english: Once I had finished my exams, I could give my undivided attention to looking for a job.
examples.chinese: 考试一结束，我就可以一心一意去找工作了。

centers.english: to pay so much attention to something that you do not notice other things
centers.chinese: 对某事物专心致志，而没有注意到其他事物

examples.english: Helen was sitting up in bed, engrossed in a novel.
examples.chinese: 海伦坐在床上全神贯注地看小说。

examples.english: The two women huddled together like schoolgirls, happily engrossed in their conversation.
examples.chinese: 那两个女人就像小学生一样紧紧地靠在一起，相谈甚欢。

examples.english: He was so engrossed in what he was doing he didn't even hear the doorbell ring.
examples.chinese: 他干得那么专心，连门铃响了他都没听到。

examples.english: Hazel's totally wrapped up in the new baby.
examples.chinese: 黑兹尔把全部精力放在刚出生的孩子身上。

examples.english: ‘Some novelists get wrapped up in their celebrity status,’ he acknowledged. ‘I hope that doesn't happen to me.’
examples.chinese: “有些小说家心里只惦着个人名位，”他承认说，“希望我不是这样。”

examples.english: I was so absorbed in the game on TV that I didn't hear Alexis come in.
examples.chinese: 我聚精会神地在看电视上的比赛，连亚历克西斯进来都没有听到。

examples.english: The little boy sat at the edge of the pond, totally absorbed in watching the fish.
examples.chinese: 小男孩坐在池塘边沿上，出神地看着水里的鱼儿。

examples.english: He immersed himself in his work and tried to forget about Julia.
examples.chinese: 他埋首于工作中，试图忘掉朱莉娅。

examples.english: For the first time, I had the chance to really immerse myself in Lenin's writings.
examples.chinese: 我头一回有机会完全沉浸于列宁的著作中。

examples.english: The possibility of computer addiction occurred to her when she missed a class she was teaching, because she was immersed in the Internet.
examples.chinese: 她可能对电脑上瘾了，那一次她因为上网入迷竟然忘记了去讲课。

examples.english: Parents are often too busy, tired, or preoccupied to give their children the time and attention they need.
examples.chinese: 家长们往往太忙太累，或者烦心的事儿太多，不能给予孩子应有的时间和关心。

examples.english: Most Russians are preoccupied with matters close to home, their economic conditions in particular.
examples.chinese: 大多数俄罗斯人都关注着关系到切身利益的事情，尤其是经济状况。

centers.english: not paying attention to what is happening
centers.chinese: 不关心正在发生的事情

examples.english: What did the announcers just say? I wasn't paying attention.
examples.chinese: 播音员刚才说了什么？我没注意听。

examples.english: When you're young, you don't pay attention to what your parents are saying half the time.
examples.chinese: 人在年轻的时候经常不听父母的话。

examples.english: Blackthorne was sitting alone in a corner of the garden, daydreaming.
examples.chinese: 布莱克索恩一个人坐在花园的一个角落里做着白日梦。

examples.english: Almost anyone who has ever read a good book has daydreamed about writing his or her own best-seller.
examples.chinese: 几乎人人都会读了一本好书就梦想着自己也要写一本畅销书。

examples.english: In the end I got sick of the conversation and switched off.
examples.chinese: 最后我聊得腻烦了，就闭口不言。

examples.english: It's difficult for teachers to switch off when they go home at night.
examples.chinese: 当老师的晚上回到家里之后很难做到不去想工作的事。

examples.english: Sorry, I was miles away. What did you say?
examples.chinese: 对不起，我刚才走神了，你说什么?

examples.english: I don't mean to disturb you, you looked miles away -- but there's a call for you.
examples.chinese: 对不起，打搅了，你好像有什么心事—有一个电话找你呢。

examples.english: I tried hard to concentrate, but my mind kept wandering.
examples.chinese: 我拼命地想集中注意力，可老是心不在焉。

examples.english: His mind wandered to the things he was trying not to think about.
examples.chinese: 他的思绪又回到他努力不去想的那些事情上。

examples.english: Corrinne let her mind wander back to the days when they first met.
examples.chinese: 科琳的思绪回到他们初次相识的那个时候。

examples.english: Roger was hyperactive and inattentive as a child.
examples.chinese: 罗杰小时候极度活跃，对什么事都不能专心。

examples.english: In spite of the inattentive servers and the bad decor, it's worth eating at Leon's for the great cheap food.
examples.chinese: 尽管利昂餐馆侍者服务不周，装潢欠佳，但是食品价廉物美，值得一尝。

examples.english: The government is still being accused of being inattentive to the plight of the Health Service.
examples.chinese: 政府仍被指责对国民医疗保健制度的困难处境漠不关心。

examples.english: Sensing that the team was losing their concentration, Barret called a time out.
examples.chinese: 巴雷特感觉到球队分神了，于是要求暂停。

examples.english: With too much homework, children may lose concentration and stop progressing.
examples.chinese: 小孩子功课太多就会没有心思去做，从而影响学习的进度。

centers.english: not paying attention to a particular subject or person
centers.chinese: 不注意某个特别的话题或人

examples.english: Don't pay attention to anything they say - they're just trying to get money out of you.
examples.chinese: 不要去理他们的话—他们只是想骗你的钱。

examples.english: More than half the people in the study said they do not pay attention to election campaigns.
examples.chinese: 接受调查的人有半数以上都说他们不关心竞选活动。

examples.english: A high-level military official warned people not to pay attention to rumours about invasion.
examples.chinese: 一名高级军官告诫人们不要去理会有关入侵的谣传。

expressions.text: take no notice/not take any notice

examples.english: The conflict continued in the small African state, but the world took no notice.
examples.chinese: 在这个非洲小国，冲突仍在继续，可是世人却不予关注。

examples.english: My parents didn't seem to take any notice of my wails as we drove down the motorway.
examples.chinese: 我们在高速公路上行驶时，父母对我的大声哭叫似乎毫不在意。

centers.english: to make someone pay attention to you

examples.english: Young children sometimes behave badly simply in order to get attention.
examples.chinese: 小孩子有时表现差只是为了引起别人注意。

examples.english: With all the competition, a website really has to give away something good to get people's attention.
examples.chinese: 面对这么多的竞争，网站真的不得不送出一些好东西来吸引人们的注意。

examples.english: He was waving his hand wildly, trying to attract Kovitsky's attention.
examples.chinese: 他疯狂地挥着手，想引起科维茨基的注意。

examples.english: I did a few of the usual idiotic things as a teenager to try to draw attention to myself.
examples.chinese: 我在十来岁的时候，经常会做一些傻事来引起别人注意。

examples.english: Carney knew he would draw attention to himself if he rented a boat in the middle of winter.
examples.chinese: 卡尼知道，他要是在隆冬时候去租一条船，将会吸引很多目光。

centers.english: to make people pay attention to a subject or problem
centers.chinese: 使人们注意某个话题或问题

examples.english: The group is willing to use terrorism in order to draw attention to their desire for independence.
examples.chinese: 这个组织愿以恐怖手段来引起世人关注他们独立的愿望。

examples.english: Fox was one of the first US scientists to call attention to the rising levels of carbon dioxide in the atmosphere.
examples.chinese: 福克斯是最早提醒人们注意大气中二氧化碳含量提高的美国科学家之一。

examples.english: The report highlighted the need for prison reform.
examples.chinese: 报告特别强调了监狱改革的必要性。

examples.english: The Association's first project was to publish a 35-cent brochure highlighting nine historic sites.
examples.chinese: 协会的第一个计划是印发一份售价35美分的小册子，重点介绍九大历史古迹。

examples.english: The publicity campaign helped to focus attention on the needs of elderly people in the community.
examples.chinese: 这一宣传活动有助于引起公众对社区老年人需求的关注。

examples.english: The media's efforts often focus public attention on government incompetence, forcing government to do the right thing.
examples.chinese: 媒体往往努力把公众的注意力集中到政府的无能上，从而迫使政府采取正确的行动。

examples.english: It was one of the other students who brought your misbehaviour to my attention.
examples.chinese: 有一名同学提醒我注意你的不良行为。

examples.english: The reviews provide a way for companies to bring their trade concerns to the attention of the government.
examples.chinese: 这些评论为公司提供了一种途径，使自己的商业利益得到政府注意。

examples.english: He pointed out the danger of a mountain trek at this time of year.
examples.chinese: 他指出这时候到山区徒步旅行很危险。

examples.english: I pointed out that changing the date would mean rescheduling the press conference.
examples.chinese: 我指出，改日期就意味着要重新安排新闻发布会。

examples.english: I didn't realise I'd made a mistake. Thank you for pointing it out.
examples.chinese: 我没有意识到犯了个错误，谢谢你给我指出来。

examples.english: As Palermo pointed out, Peruvian university students tend to be highly political.
examples.chinese: 正如巴勒莫所言，秘鲁的大学生政治意识很强。

centers.english: when someone or something gets a lot of attention
centers.chinese: 某人或某事物吸引很多注意力

examples.english: The young Senator is getting a lot of attention.
examples.chinese: 这位年轻的参议员吸引了很多注意力。

examples.english: The film has attracted considerable attention since it was released last week.
examples.chinese: 这部影片自上周发行以后已引起了相当多的关注。

expressions.text: be the centre of attention /be the center of attentio

examples.english: I loved talking and being the centre of attention, so I was chosen to be spokesperson.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢说话，而且也喜欢成为人们注意的中心，所以被推选为发言人。

examples.english: Eliot argued that it should be the poetry, not the poet's personality, that is the center of attention.
examples.chinese: 艾略特认为，注意的焦点应该是诗歌，而不是诗人的个性。

examples.english: The earthquake has made skyscrapers the focus of attention.
examples.chinese: 地震使摩天大楼成了人们注意的焦点。

examples.english: The Airline became the focus of attention yesterday after its stock fell dramatically to 31 cents.
examples.chinese: 这家航空公司昨天股价狂泻至31美分，从而成了人们关注的焦点。

examples.english: Suddenly Carmichael, the shy lead singer, was the focus of millions of young girls’ attention.
examples.chinese: 一时间，卡迈克尔这腼腆的主唱歌手成了千万少女关注的焦点。

examples.english: Jerry loves the attention he gets when he's performing
examples.chinese: 杰里喜欢表演时那种受人瞩目的感觉。

examples.english: The intense media attention surrounding the case, has made it very difficult for the family to cope.
examples.chinese: 媒体对此案件的密切关注使得这家人穷于应付

centers.english: to avoid attention or take attention away
centers.chinese: 避开注意力或转移注意力

examples.english: It was obvious that Jackson didn't want to draw attention to himself.
examples.chinese: 杰克逊显然是不想引起别人的注意。

examples.english: The city's wealth allows drug traffickers to live a comfortable lifestyle without drawing attention to themselves.
examples.chinese: 这个城市的富庶使贩毒分子生活得悠然自得，丝毫不会引起别人的注意。

examples.english: Aides to the Prime Minister tried to avoid drawing public attention to the speech.
examples.chinese: 首相助理试图避免吸引公众对演说的关注。

examples.english: The government was hoping to draw attention away from the current economic crisis.
examples.chinese: 政府希望把人们的注意力从当前的经济危机上引开。

examples.english: His ‘bad-boy’ behaviour tends to draw attention away from many of the good things he is doing in his community.
examples.chinese: 他的“坏小子”行为经常使人们忽视了他在社区里所做的好事。

examples.english: The debate is diverting attention from the urgent need to improve the way the medical system cares for terminally ill patients.
examples.chinese: 这场辩论转移了人们对迫切需要改进医疗制度中如何关怀绝症病人的注意力。

examples.english: The bomb could have been planted in order to distract attention from the robbery.
examples.chinese: 炸弹很有可能是为了引开人们对这起抢劫案的注意而安置的。

examples.english: Before we could explore the matter further, some new evidence diverted our attention.
examples.chinese: 就在我们要对此事作进一步调查之前，一些新的证据转移了我们的注意力。

examples.english: Stop staring at me, it's putting me off.
examples.chinese: 别盯着我看，这样会让我分心的。

examples.english: All the noise from the crowd put Alison off her game.
examples.chinese: 人群的喧闹影响了艾利森比赛。

examples.english: She's keeping a low profile until the scandal is forgotten.
examples.chinese: 她一直保持低调，等待丑闻被人遗忘。

examples.english: Many of the exiles have married, taken jobs, and generally kept a low profile.
examples.chinese: 这些被流放的人中许多都结了婚，找了工作，而且一般都生活得很低调。

examples.english: Doctor, I keep getting a pain in my throat.
examples.chinese: 医生，我老是喉咙痛。

examples.english: Tracy is interested in journalism, but Sarah wants to be a doctor.
examples.chinese: 特雷西对新闻工作感兴趣，而萨拉却想成为一名医生。

examples.english: She looks very ill - you'd better call a doctor.
examples.chinese: 她看上去病得很重—你最好去请一位医生来。

examples.english: I went to see the doctor about my cough but she said there was nothing wrong with me.
examples.chinese: 我咳嗽去看医生，可她说我没什么事。

examples.english: ‘Where's Karen?’ ‘She's at the doctor's.’
examples.chinese: “卡伦在哪儿？”“她在诊所。”

examples.english: I'd like to make an appointment to see Doctor Patel some time this morning.
examples.chinese: 我想今天早上约个时间去帕特尔医生那里看病。

examples.english: Dr Harrington has warned that the NHS is in serious need of greater funding.
examples.chinese: 哈林顿医生警告说，英国的国民保健制度急需更多资金。

examples.english: People with heart problems should talk to their physician before making the trip.
examples.chinese: 心脏有问题的人外出旅行前应先去咨询一下医生。

examples.english: If your GP can't help you he will refer you to a specialist.
examples.chinese: 如果普通医生看不了你的病，他会向你推荐一名专科医生的。

examples.english: A lot of GPs are too quick to prescribe drugs, instead of letting the body get better on its own.
examples.chinese: 许多普通医生动不动就开药，而不是让身体自行康复。

examples.english: The doctor arranged for Marcel to see a top specialist in Paris.
examples.chinese: 医生安排马塞尔去看巴黎最好的一位专科医生。

examples.english: Professor Holloway, an eye specialist, organized a national survey of eye diseases in children.
examples.chinese: 眼科医生霍洛韦教授组织了一次全国性的儿童眼疾调查。

examples.english: Professor Williams is one of the world's leading specialists in radiotherapy.
examples.chinese: 威廉斯教授是世界上顶尖的放射治疗专家之一。

examples.english: The consultant told Jean that an operation was necessary to save her life.
examples.chinese: 顾问医生告诉琼，要挽救她的生命就必须动手术。

examples.english: Dr Jamieson is the consultant psychologist at St Andrew's hospital.
examples.chinese: 贾米森医生是圣安德鲁医院的心理学会诊专家。
