examples.english: The surgeon told reporters that Sara was making good progress after the heart transplant.
examples.chinese: 外科医生告诉记者，萨拉在心脏移植手术之后康复进展良好。

examples.english: A famous brain surgeon from Boston performed the operation.
examples.chinese: 波士顿的一名著名脑外科医生做了这次手术。

examples.english: She refused to be treated by an intern and demanded to see a qualified doctor.
examples.chinese: 她拒绝由实习医生治疗，要求由具备合格资历的医生看病。

examples.english: The magazine's chief function is to keep the medical profession up to date with the latest advances and drugs.
examples.chinese: 这本杂志的主要作用是让医学界掌握有关医疗技术和药物的最新信息。

examples.english: These proposals are unpopular with most of the medical profession.
examples.chinese: 这些提议在多数医务人员中都不受欢迎。

centers.english: a doctor who treats mental illnesses

examples.english: Her psychiatrist told her she no longer needed to take tranquillizers.
examples.chinese: 她的精神科医生说她再也不用服镇静剂了。

examples.english: Child psychiatrist Dr Goldman has written a book on anorexia in young girls.
examples.chinese: 儿童精神科医生戈德曼医生写了一本关于年幼女童厌食症的书。

examples.english: I made an appointment to see a psychiatrist the following week.
examples.chinese: 我约好了下周去看精神科医生。

examples.english: I don't think her analyst has really helped her very much.
examples.chinese: 我觉得她的精神分析医生没给她很大帮助。

examples.english: My therapist has been working with me on my anger.
examples.chinese: 我的心理分析医生在帮我治疗我的愤怒情绪。

examples.english: He admitted to his psychologist that he had been too shy to talk to women.
examples.chinese: 他向心理专家承认自己以前怕羞不敢和女性说话。

examples.english: She told us she worked as an educational psychologist in Athens.
examples.chinese: 她告诉我们她在雅典当教育心理学家。

examples.english: Blau has been a counselor at the school since 1987.
examples.chinese: 布劳自1987年起一直是那所学校的辅导顾问。

examples.english: Maybe we should see a marriage counsellor.
examples.chinese: 也许我们该去咨询一下婚姻顾问。

examples.english: The shrinks at the hospital said they think Gary needs therapy.
examples.chinese: 这家医院的精神科医生说加里需要接受治疗。

examples.english: That guy's crazy - he ought to see a shrink.
examples.chinese: 那家伙疯了——他应该去看精神科医生。

centers.english: a doctor who treats people's teeth

examples.english: My dentist told me I shouldn't eat so much chocolate.
examples.chinese: 牙医说我不应该吃那么多的巧克力。

examples.english: You should visit the dentist twice a year.
examples.chinese: 你应该一年看两次牙科医生。

examples.english: I hate going to the dentist's.
examples.chinese: 我讨厌去牙科诊所。

examples.english: Jane's taking her kitten to the vet on Friday.
examples.chinese: 简打算星期五带她的小猫去看兽医。

examples.english: Could you call the vet and ask him to come to the farm? I'd like him to have a look at one of the horses.
examples.chinese: 你打个电话给兽医叫他到农场来好吗？我想让他看看一匹马。

examples.english: Gina has wanted to be a veterinarian since she was a little girl.
examples.chinese: 吉娜小时候起就想当一名兽医。

centers.english: legal drugs used to treat illnesses, pain etc
centers.chinese: 用于治病止痛等的合法药物

examples.english: Morphine is a very powerful drug.
examples.chinese: 吗啡药性非常强。

examples.english: The drugs I take for hay fever make me feel very drowsy.
examples.chinese: 我吃了治花粉病的药，感到昏昏欲睡。

examples.english: One disadvantage of the drug is that it is very expensive.
examples.chinese: 这种药的一个缺点是太贵了。

examples.english: The New Jersey drug maker will begin marketing its new anti-balding medication in April.
examples.chinese: 那家新泽西州的制药商将于4月份在市场上推出其新开发的防脱发药。

examples.english: The article says that Ware tried to commit suicide by combining prescription drugs and alcohol.
examples.chinese: 文章说韦尔把处方药和酒一起服下企图自杀。

examples.english: Thompson was arrested for selling drugs in the fall of 1992.
examples.chinese: 1992年秋，汤普森因贩毒被捕。

examples.english: a new campaign to warn teens about the danger of drugs
examples.chinese: 告诫青少年毒品危害性的一场新宣传活动

examples.english: The agency's efforts to reduce the flow of illegal drugs into the United States has largely failed.
examples.chinese: 这家专门机构想要减少毒品流入美国的努力大部分都失败了。

examples.english: Dewey said that legalizing marijuana would encourage people to experiment with hard drugs such as cocaine or heroin.
examples.chinese: 杜威说使大麻合法化可能会鼓励人们去尝试可卡因或海洛因这类硬毒品。

examples.english: Seven out of ten teenagers said they had tried soft drugs.
examples.chinese: 十个青少年中就有七个说试过服用软毒品。

examples.english: She has been treated for alcohol and drug abuse.
examples.chinese: 她因酗酒和吸毒而接受过治疗。

examples.english: The organization tries to deal with the widespread problems of drug addiction and alcoholism.
examples.chinese: 该团体试图解决涉及面很广的吸毒和酗酒问题。

examples.english: Laws governing the sale of narcotics vary from state to state.
examples.chinese: 监管非法麻醉品买卖的法律在州与州之间各不相同。

examples.english: Police are investigating a recent spate of narcotics offenses in Miami.
examples.chinese: 警方正在调查最近迈阿密发生的一连串毒品犯罪事件。

examples.english: Tucker was charged with the possession of an illegal substance.
examples.chinese: 塔克被指控私藏违禁药物。

examples.english: Drug tests taken 24 hours after the crash showed no trace of illegal substances in either of the drivers.
examples.chinese: 撞车事件发生24小时后进行的药物测试显示，两名驾车者均未有服用违禁药物的迹象。

examples.english: I can't take penicillin; I'm allergic to it.
examples.chinese: 我不能用青霉素，我对它过敏。

examples.english: She took a couple of aspirins before going to bed.
examples.chinese: 她上床睡觉前服了几片阿司匹林。

examples.english: Sinclair admitted that she had taken drugs several years before.
examples.chinese: 辛克莱承认几年前曾服用过毒品。

examples.english: He neither drinks nor takes drugs.
examples.chinese: 他既不喝酒又不吸毒。

examples.english: How long has she been on heroin?
examples.chinese: 她吸食海洛因有多久了?

examples.english: Our 28-year-old son is on drugs.
examples.chinese: 我们那个28岁的儿子有毒瘾。

examples.english: She first started using drugs when she was thirteen.
examples.chinese: 她13岁时第一次吸食毒品。

examples.english: Morgan stopped using drugs and alcohol six years ago when he entered a long-term treatment program.
examples.chinese: 摩根六年前参加了一个长期治疗计划，自此就停止吸毒和酗酒了。

examples.english: Herring, 55, is a former drug user who started the foundation in San José in 1980.
examples.chinese: 55岁的赫林以前曾是吸毒者，他于1980年在圣何塞创立了该基金会。

examples.english: I did a lot of drugs when I was at university.
examples.chinese: 我在大学里曾大量服用过毒品。

examples.english: Davis said he quit doing drugs when he became a parent.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯说他当爸爸以后就不再吸毒了。

examples.english: Most heroin users prefer to inject the drug.
examples.chinese: 大多数使用海洛因的人都喜欢用注射的方法。

examples.english: A drug that is injected reaches the brain faster than if it is smoked or sniffed.
examples.chinese: 注射毒品比吸食或以鼻吸入的方式要更迅速地使药效到达大脑。

examples.english: Two years ago I was both smoking and injecting.
examples.chinese: 两年前我既吸食又注射毒品。

examples.english: I think I'm starting to come down. Let's smoke another joint.
examples.chinese: 我觉得开始清醒过来了。我们再来吸一支大麻卷烟吧。

centers.english: when someone's mind has been affected by illegal drugs
centers.chinese: 某人的神志受到毒品药性的影响

examples.english: God, I got so high last night.
examples.chinese: 天哪，昨晚我吸毒后兴奋得很。

examples.english: Newton died at age 47 while high on crack cocaine.
examples.chinese: 牛顿在吸食强效可卡因后处于极度兴奋状态时死亡，终年47岁。

examples.english: She was as high as a kite.
examples.chinese: 她极度兴奋。

examples.english: The guy playing lead guitar was completely stoned.
examples.chinese: 那个首席吉他手吸毒后彻底神志恍惚了。

examples.english: ‘What did you guys end up doing last night?’ ‘Not much. We got stoned and watched TV - that's about it.’
examples.chinese: “昨晚后来你们去干什么了？”“没什么。我们吸了毒迷迷糊糊看电视，就这点事。”

examples.english: I was still way too wired to go to bed.
examples.chinese: 我仍然兴奋得无法上床睡觉。

expressions.text: be out of your head/be out of it

examples.english: Can Sally go back in your room and lie down? She's really out of it.
examples.chinese: 萨莉可以回你的房间躺下来吗？她神志很模糊了。

examples.english: They had taken some mushrooms and were completely out of their heads by the time they got to the party.
examples.chinese: 他们服用了一些致幻蘑菇，来到聚会上时已完全神志不清了。

centers.english: to take too much of a drug

examples.english: Can someone call an ambulance? I think he's taken an overdose.
examples.chinese: 谁帮忙叫辆救护车来行吗？我想他是服药过量了。

examples.english: The woman apparently tried to commit suicide by taking an overdose of a prescription drug.
examples.chinese: 这女人显然是想以过量服用处方药来自杀。

examples.english: Marilyn Monroe was 36 when she died of an overdose of sleeping pills in August 1962.
examples.chinese: 玛丽莲·梦露于1962年8月因过量服用安眠药死亡，享年36岁。

examples.english: He overdosed on heroin.
examples.chinese: 他服用了过量的海洛因。

examples.english: ‘How did she die?’ ‘She OD'd.’
examples.chinese: “她怎么死的？”“她吸毒过量了。”

examples.english: Brody OD'd on a mixture of cocaine and heroin.
examples.chinese: 布罗迪过量服用了可卡因加海洛因混合剂。

examples.english: It was ten years before she managed to come off morphine.
examples.chinese: 她花了十年时间设法戒掉了吗啡。

examples.english: He's been in rehab for over three months.
examples.chinese: 他接受戒毒〔戒酒〕康复治疗已有三个多月了。

examples.english: Danny was recently arrested for cocaine, but he's kept his job and he's in rehab.
examples.chinese: 丹尼最近因吸食可卡因被捕，但他仍有工作，正在接受康复治疗。

examples.english: a rehab center
examples.chinese: 康复中心

examples.english: He's wanted in the US on charges of drug trafficking.
examples.chinese: 他因受指控从事毒品买卖而遭美国通缉。

examples.english: The government's efforts to limit drug trafficking have mostly failed.
examples.chinese: 该政府要限制毒品买卖的努力大部分都失败了。

examples.english: a suspected drug trafficker
examples.chinese: 被怀疑贩毒的人

examples.english: He was accused of purchasing cocaine from an Indianapolis drug dealer.
examples.chinese: 他被控从一名印第安诺波利斯的毒品贩子手中购买可卡因。

examples.english: Police arrested a dealer yesterday who was selling marijuana to 12-year-olds.
examples.chinese: 警察昨天拘捕了一名毒品贩子，他把大麻卖给12岁的儿童。

examples.english: A pusher approached us, asking if we wanted to buy any crack.
examples.chinese: 一个贩毒者走过来，问我们要不要买强效可卡因。

examples.english: Being a university city, Oxford is an obvious target for the pushers.
examples.chinese: 牛津作为一座大学城，显然是贩毒者的目标。

examples.english: Lucy works as a nurse at the local hospital.
examples.chinese: 露西在当地医院做护士。

examples.english: I was in hospital for eight weeks after the accident.
examples.chinese: 遭遇那场事故之后，我住了八个星期的医院。

examples.english: A man has been admitted to hospital with gunshot wounds.
examples.chinese: 一名男子因为受了枪伤已被送进医院。

examples.english: There is an urgent need to make more hospital beds available for long-term patients.
examples.chinese: 医院急需更多的病床以供长期住院的病人使用。

examples.english: Frank is being treated at Valley Medical Center with minor injuries.
examples.chinese: 弗兰克因为一些小伤正在山谷医疗中心接受治疗。

examples.english: The test is expensive and available only at certain medical centers.
examples.chinese: 这种检验费用高昂，而且只有某些医疗中心才提供。

examples.english: The Harvey Clinic specializes in the treatment of alcohol-related problems.
examples.chinese: 哈维诊所专治与酗酒有关的各类病症。

examples.english: Ellen decided to go to the family planning clinic for some advice.
examples.chinese: 埃伦决定去计划生育门诊部咨询。

examples.english: Mary, who was suffering from terminal cancer, spent her last few months in a hospice.
examples.chinese: 玛丽患了晚期癌症，在一家安养院度过了最后的几个月。

centers.english: a hospital for people who are mentally ill

examples.english: Shirley spent most of her adult life in a mental hospital.
examples.chinese: 雪莉成年以后大部分时间都在一家精神病医院里度过。

examples.english: At the age of 19 Greg had a nervous breakdown and had to be admitted to a mental hospital.
examples.chinese: 格雷格19岁的时候精神崩溃，被收进一家精神病院。

expressions.text: commit somebody to a mental hospital

examples.english: Knapman was committed to a mental hospital in August.
examples.chinese: 8月，纳普曼被送进一家精神病院。

examples.english: Humphrey is in a state psychiatric hospital after being convicted of beating his grandmother.
examples.chinese: 汉弗莱殴打祖母的罪名被判成立以后，就进了一家州立精神病医院。

examples.english: The judge will decide whether Barry will be sent to prison or a psychiatric hospital.
examples.chinese: 法官将判定送巴里去坐牢还是去精神病医院。

examples.english: Sally spent several years in an institution.
examples.chinese: 萨莉曾在精神病院里住过好几年。

examples.english: Psychiatrists argue that closing down mental institutions will lead to more homeless people on our streets.
examples.chinese: 精神病专家认为，关闭精神病院将会使我们的街头上出现更多的无家可归者。

examples.english: Funding has been approved for a 40-bed unit for the elderly at Aberdare General Hospital.
examples.chinese: 阿伯德尔综合医院要建立40个床位的老人科，此项拨款已获批准。

examples.english: A new psychiatric unit will be added to the John F. Kennedy Medical Center.
examples.chinese: 肯尼迪医疗中心将添设一个新的精神病科。

examples.english: He arrived in casualty with multiple injuries to his head.
examples.chinese: 他来到急诊室，头部多处受伤。

examples.english: Thorpe was treated in the casualty department at Middlesborough General.
examples.chinese: 索普在米德尔斯伯勒综合医院的急诊部接受治疗。

examples.english: Emergency room doctors tried to save Ryan's life.
examples.chinese: 急救室的医生尽力挽救瑞安的生命。

examples.english: Linda is a doctor in a ward for premature babies.
examples.chinese: 琳达是早产儿病房的医生。

examples.english: When her baby was due, Barbara was admitted to the maternity ward of Mercy Hospital.
examples.chinese: 芭芭拉临产的时候，被收进默西医院的产科病房。

examples.english: Two outpatient clinics in the area are offering drug treatment programs.
examples.chinese: 本区有两个门诊诊所提供戒毒疗程。
